title: Python concurrent.futures
text:
## ProcessPoolExecutor

``python

from concurrent.futures import ProcessPoolExecutor, as_completed

def task(index: int) -> int:
 print(f"task {index} start in {os.getpid()}")

 if index % 3 == 0:
 raise RuntimeError(f"task {index} error")

 time.sleep(3 - index % 3)

 return index

with ProcessPoolExecutor(max_workers=3) as executor:
 # Non-blocking
 # pool ŪĀ¨Íłįžóź žÉĀÍīÄ žóÜžĚī žěĎžóÖ žěźž≤īŽäĒ ŽįĒŽ°ú ž†úž∂ú Žź®
 futures = [executor.submit(task, *args) for args in [(i,) for i in range(10)]]
 print("submit done")

 # žôĄŽ£ĆŽźú žěĎžóÖžĚĄ ÍįÄž†łžėī
 for future in as_completed(futures):
 try:
 # žóźŽü¨ žóÜžĚī taskÍįÄ žôĄŽ£ĆŽźėžóąžĚĄ ŽēĆ Í≤įÍ≥ľŽ•ľ ÍįÄž†łžėī
 result = future.result()
 print(f"task {result} done")
 except BaseException as e:
 # taskŽ•ľ žč§ŪĖČŪēėŽäĒ ŽŹĄž§Ď ŽįúžÉĚŪēú žóźŽü¨ ž≤ėŽ¶¨
 print(f"exception: {e}")
`

`python

from concurrent.futures import Future, ProcessPoolExecutor, wait

def task(index: int) -> int:
 print(f"task {index} start in {os.getpid()}")

 if index % 3 == 0:
 raise RuntimeError(f"task {index} error")

 time.sleep(3 - index % 3)

 return index

def callback(fut: Future[int]):
 try:
 # žóźŽü¨ žóÜžĚī taskÍįÄ žôĄŽ£ĆŽźėžóąžĚĄ ŽēĆ Í≤įÍ≥ľŽ•ľ ÍįÄž†łžėī
 result = fut.result()
 print(f"task {result} done")
 except BaseException as e:
 # taskŽ•ľ žč§ŪĖČŪēėŽäĒ ŽŹĄž§Ď ŽįúžÉĚŪēú žóźŽü¨ ž≤ėŽ¶¨
 print(f"exception: {e}")

with ProcessPoolExecutor(max_workers=3) as executor:
 # Non-blocking
 # pool ŪĀ¨Íłįžóź žÉĀÍīÄ žóÜžĚī žěĎžóÖ žěźž≤īŽäĒ ŽįĒŽ°ú ž†úž∂ú Žź®
 futures: list[Future[int]] = []
 for args in [(i,) for i in range(10)]:
 future = executor.submit(task, *args)
 future.add_done_callback(callback)
 futures.append(future)
 print("submit done")

 # Ž™®Žď† žěĎžóÖžĚī žôĄŽ£ĆŽź† ŽēĆÍĻĆžßÄ ŽĆÄÍłį
 wait(futures)
`

ProcessPoolExecutorŽ•ľ žā¨žö©Ūē† ŽēĆ, timeout ÍłįŽä•žĚĄ ž†úÍ≥ĶŪēėŽäĒ FuturežĚė Ž©ĒžĄúŽďúŽāė, žĚīŽ•ľ žĚłžěźŽ°ú ŽįõŽäĒ Ūē®žąėŽ•ľ žā¨žö©ŪēėŽ©ī ŪĒĄŽ°úÍ∑łŽě® žÉĀžóźžĄúŽäĒ timeoutŽźú Í≤ÉžúľŽ°ú Ž≥īžĚīžßÄŽßĆ žč§ž†úŽ°úŽäĒ žěĎžóÖžĚī Í≥ĄžÜć žßĄŪĖČŽźėŽäĒ Ž¨łž†úÍįÄ žěąžäĶŽčąŽč§.

timeoutžĚī ŪēĄžöĒŪēú Í≤Ĺžöį, ProcessPoolExecutor._processesŽ•ľ žßĀž†Ď žā¨žö©Ūēėžó¨ ProcessŽ•ľ žĘÖŽ£ĆžčúŪā§ÍĪįŽāė multiprocessing Ž™®ŽďąŽ°ú ŪĒĄŽ°úÍ∑łŽě®žĚĄ žěĎžĄĪŪēīžēľŪē©ŽčąŽč§.

## ProcessPoolExecutor with asyncio

asyncioŽ°ú ŪĒĄŽ°úÍ∑łŽěėŽįćžĚĄ ŪēėŽč§Ž≥īŽ©ī CPU-bound žěĎžóÖžóź žĚėŪēī žĚīŽ≤§Ūäł Ž£®ŪĒĄÍįÄ ŽłĒŽ°úŪāĻŽźėžĖī Žč§Ž•ł žěĎžóÖžĚī žč§ŪĖČŽźėžßÄ žēäŽäĒ Í≤ĹžöįÍįÄ žěąžäĶŽčąŽč§. žĚīŽ•ľ ŪēīÍ≤įŪēėÍłįžúĄŪēī ProcessPoolExecutorŽßĆ žā¨žö©ŪēėŽäĒ Í≤ĹžöįžóźŽŹĄ žĚīŽ≤§Ūäł Ž£®ŪĒĄÍįÄ ŽłĒŽ°úŪāĻŽźėÍłį ŽēĆŽ¨łžóź, loop.run_in_executorŽ•ľ žā¨žö©Ūēėžó¨ Ūē®žąė žč§ŪĖČžĚĄ awaitableŽ°ú Ž≥ÄÍ≤ĹŪēėŽäĒ žěĎžóÖžĚĄ Ūēīž§ėžēľŪē©ŽčąŽč§.

`python

from concurrent.futures import ProcessPoolExecutor

def task(index: int) -> int:
 print(f"task {index} start in {os.getpid()}")

 if index % 3 == 0:
 raise RuntimeError(f"task {index} error")

 time.sleep(10 - index % 3)

 return index

async def cpu_bound_task() -> list[int]:
 loop = asyncio.get_event_loop()
 with ProcessPoolExecutor(max_workers=3) as executor:
 # Non-blocking
 # pool ŪĀ¨Íłįžóź žÉĀÍīÄ žóÜžĚī žěĎžóÖ žěźž≤īŽäĒ ŽįĒŽ°ú ž†úž∂ú Žź®
 futures = [
 loop.run_in_executor(executor, task, *args) for args in [(i,) for i in range(10)]
 ]
 print("submit done")

 results = []
 for future in asyncio.as_completed(futures):
 try:
 # žóźŽü¨ žóÜžĚī taskÍįÄ žôĄŽ£ĆŽźėžóąžĚĄ ŽēĆ Í≤įÍ≥ľŽ•ľ ÍįÄž†łžėī
 # ÍłįŽč§Ž¶¨ŽäĒ ŽŹôžēą Žč§Ž•ł async žěĎžóÖžĚī žč§ŪĖČŽź† žąė žěąžĚĆ
 result = await future
 print(f"task {result} done")

 results.append(result)
 except BaseException as e:
 # taskŽ•ľ žč§ŪĖČŪēėŽäĒ ŽŹĄž§Ď ŽįúžÉĚŪēú žóźŽü¨ ž≤ėŽ¶¨
 print(f"exception: {e}")

 return results
`

## žěźžčĚ ŪĒĄŽ°úžĄłžä§žóźžĄú signal ŪēłŽď§ŽßĀ

ŪĒĄŽ°úžĄłžä§ÍįÄ žÉĚžĄĪŽź† ŽēĆ,

- forkžĚė Í≤Ĺžöį žěźžčĚ ŪĒĄŽ°úžĄłžä§ŽäĒ Ž∂ÄŽ™®žĚė Ž™®Žď† žěźžõźžĚĄ žÉĀžÜćŽįõžäĶŽčąŽč§. ŽĒįŽĚľžĄú žÉĚžĄĪŽźėŽäĒ žčúž†źžĚė Ž∂ÄŽ™® ŪĒĄŽ°úžĄłžä§žĚė signal handlerŽ•ľ žÉĀžÜćŽįõžäĶŽčąŽč§.
- spawnžĚė Í≤Ĺžöį žěźžčĚ ŪĒĄŽ°úžĄłžä§ŽäĒ ŪēĄžöĒŪēú žěźžõźŽßĆ žÉĀžÜćŽįõžäĶŽčąŽč§.

žěźžčĚ ŪĒĄŽ°úžĄłžä§ÍįÄ žčúÍ∑łŽĄźžóź žĚėŪēī žĘÖŽ£ĆŽźėŽäĒ Í≤ÉžĚĄ ŽßČžēĄžēľŪēėŽäĒ Í≤ĹžöįÍįÄ žěąŽäĒŽćį, žĚīŽ•ľ žúĄŪēī Process žčúžěĎ žčú signal handlerŽ•ľ Ž¨īžčúŪēėŽŹĄŽ°Ě žĄ§ž†ēŪēīžēľŪē©ŽčąŽč§.

`python

from concurrent.futures import ProcessPoolExecutor

def ignore_signal() -> None:
 signal.signal(signal.SIGINT, signal.SIG_IGN)
 signal.signal(signal.SIGTERM, signal.SIG_IGN)

with ProcessPoolExecutor(5, initializer=ignore_signal) as executor:
 ...
``

title: Python Convert bytes to ctypes.Structure
text:
## bytes -> ctyeps.Structure

``python
from ctypes import c_int16, c_int32, memmove, pointer, sizeof, Structure

class Data(Structure):
 # | a | b | c |
 # XX XX XX XX XX XX XX XX

 _fields_ = [
 ("a", c_int16),
 ("b", c_int16),
 ("c", c_int32),
 ]

# Little-endian
# 0x0001 => 0x01 0x00
# 0x0002 => 0x02 0x00
# 0x00000003 => 0x03 0x00 0x00 0x00
dataBytes = bytes([1, 0, 2, 0, 3, 0, 0, 0])
dataSturct = Data()

memmove(pointer(dataSturct), dataBytes, sizeof(dataSturct))

assert dataSturct.a == 1
assert dataSturct.b == 2
assert dataSturct.c == 3
`

## ctypes.Structure -> bytes

`python
from ctypes import c_int16, c_int32, memmove, pointer, sizeof, Structure

class Data(Structure):
 # | a | b | c |
 # XX XX XX XX XX XX XX XX

 _fields_ = [
 ("a", c_int16),
 ("b", c_int16),
 ("c", c_int32),
 ]

# Little-endian
# 0x0001 => 0x01 0x00
# 0x0002 => 0x02 0x00
# 0x00000003 => 0x03 0x00 0x00 0x00
dataSturct = Data(a=1, b=2, c=3)

dataBytes = bytes(dataSturct)

assert dataBytes[0] == 1
assert dataBytes[2] == 2
assert dataBytes[4] == 3
``

title: Lifespan
text:
- https://fastapi.tiangolo.com/advanced/events/

``python
from contextlib import asynccontextmanager

from fastapi import FastAPI

@asynccontextmanager
async def lifespan(app: FastAPI):
 # Startup
 yield
 # Shutdown

app = FastAPI(lifespan=lifespan)

@app.get("/healthz")
async def healthz():
 return {"status": "ok"}
`

Startup -> App -> Shutdown žąúžúľŽ°ú Ūėłž∂úŽźėŽĮÄŽ°ú StartupÍ≥ľ Shutdownžóź ŽĆÄŪēú ž≤ėŽ¶¨ ž§ĎžóźŽäĒ APIŪėłž∂úžĚī ŽźėžßÄ žēäžäĶŽčąŽč§.

lifespanžĚÄ žĶúžÉĀžúĄ žēĪžóź ŽďĪŽ°ĚŽźú Í≤ÉŽßĆ Ūėłž∂úŽź©ŽčąŽč§. app.mount("/sub", subapp)`žĚĄ ŪÜĶŪēī ŽďĪŽ°ĚŽźú subappžĚė lifespanžĚÄ Ūėłž∂úŽźėžßÄ žēäžäĶŽčąŽč§.

title: FastAPI Middleware
text:
## Ūėłž∂ú žąúžĄú

- Starlette build_middleware_stack

ŽĮłŽď§žõ®žĖī Ūėłž∂ú žąúžĄúŽäĒ FastAPI.user_middlewarežóź Žď§žĖīžěąŽäĒ žąúžĄúŽĆÄŽ°ú žč§ŪĖČŽź©ŽčąŽč§.

1. žĚłžä§ŪĄīžä§ žÉĚžĄĪ žčú žĄ§ž†ēŪēú middlewareÍįÄ FastAPI.user_middlewarežĚė ÍłįŽ≥łÍįížúľŽ°ú žĄ§ž†ēŽź©ŽčąŽč§.
1. FastAPI.add_middleware ŽėźŽäĒ @FastAPI.middleware žč§ŪĖČ žčú FastAPI.user_middlewarežĚė Žß® žēěžóź ŽĮłŽď§žõ®žĖīŽ•ľ ž∂ĒÍįÄŪē©ŽčąŽč§.
1. Ž™®Žď† žĄ§ž†ēžĚī žôĄŽ£ĆŽźú ŪõĄ ServerErrorMiddleware -\> FastAPI.user_middleware -\> ExceptionMiddleware žąúžúľŽ°ú ŽĮłŽď§žõ®žĖīÍįÄ žĄ§ž†ēŽź©ŽčąŽč§.

``python
from fastapi import FastAPI, Request, Response
from fastapi.middleware import Middleware
from starlette.middleware.base import BaseHTTPMiddleware, RequestResponseEndpoint

async def middleware1(request: Request, call_next: RequestResponseEndpoint) -> Response:
 print("Middleware 1")
 response = await call_next(request)
 print("Middleware 1")
 return response

async def middleware2(request: Request, call_next: RequestResponseEndpoint) -> Response:
 print("Middleware 2")
 response = await call_next(request)
 print("Middleware 2")
 return response

app = FastAPI(
 middleware=[
 Middleware(BaseHTTPMiddleware, dispatch=middleware1),
 ]
)

app.add_middleware(BaseHTTPMiddleware, dispatch=middleware2)

@app.middleware("http")
async def middleware3(request: Request, call_next: RequestResponseEndpoint) -> Response:
 print("Middleware 3")
 response = await call_next(request)
 print("Middleware 3")
 return response
`

`shell
Middleware 3
Middleware 2
Middleware 1
Middleware 1
Middleware 2
Middleware 3

title: Protobuf

## Protobuf

- Protobuf
- Version Support

## žĽīŪĆĆžĚľ

``shell
python3 -m pip install protobuf
`

`shell
protoc \
 --proto_path= \
 --python_out= \
 --pyi_out= \

`

-
 - --proto_path=: importŪē† Žč§Ž•ł protobuf ŪĆĆžĚľŽď§žĚė ÍłįŽ≥ł Í≤ĹŽ°ú
 - --python_out=: *_pb2.py ŪĆĆžĚľŽď§žĚī žÉĚžĄĪŽź† Ž£®Ūäł Í≤ĹŽ°ú
 - --pyi_out=: *_pb2.pyi ŪĆĆžĚľŽď§žĚī žÉĚžĄĪŽź† Ž£®Ūäł Í≤ĹŽ°ú

### Í∑úžĻô

- import a/b.proto -\> from a import b
 - ŽĒįŽĚľžĄú importŽ•ľ ŪēīžēľŪēėŽäĒ Í≤Ĺžöį ŪĆĆžĚīžć¨žóźžĄú žÉĚžĄĪŽźú ŪĆĆžĚľŽď§žĚė Í≤ĹŽ°úŽ•ľ protobuf ŪĆĆžĚľŽď§žĚė Í≤ĹŽ°úžôÄ Žßěž∂įžēľŪē† žąė žěąžäĶŽčąŽč§.

## Ž≥ÄŪôė

### Message \ Binary

`python
msg = pb.SomeProtoMessage()

# ...

binary_msg = msg.SerializeToString()
`

`python
msg = pb.SomeProtoMessage()
msg.ParseFromString(binary_msg)
`

### Message \ JSON

`python
from google.protobuf.json_format import MessageToJson

msg = pb.SomeProtoMessage()

# ...

json_msg = MessageToJson(msg)
`

`python
from google.protobuf.json_format import Parse

msg = Parse(json_msg, pb.SomeProtoMessage())
`

### Message \ Dict

`python
from google.protobuf.json_format import MessageToDict

msg = pb.SomeProtoMessage()

# ...

dict_msg = MessageToDict(msg)
`

`python
from google.protobuf.json_format import ParseDict

msg = ParseDict(dict_msg, pb.SomeProtoMessage())
``

žēĆŪĆĆžĪĄŽĄźžĚī ž∂ĒÍįÄŽźú RGBA ŽďĪžĚÄ 8 bits 4 žĪĄŽĄźŽ°ú ŪĒĹžÖÄŽßąŽč§ 32 bits ÍįížĚĄ ÍįĖžäĶŽčąŽč§.

žĚīŽĮłžßÄ ŽįįžóīžĚÄ (ÍįÄŽ°ú, žĄłŽ°ú, žĪĄŽĄź) 3 žį®žõź ŽįįžóīŽ°ú žĚīŽ£®žĖīž†łžěąÍ≥†, 1 žĪĄŽĄź žĚīŽĮłžßÄžĚė Í≤Ĺžöį (ÍįÄŽ°ú, žĄłŽ°ú) 2 žį®žõź ŽįįžóīŽ°ú ŪĎúŪėĄŪē† žąė žěąžäĶŽčąŽč§.

žėąŽ•ľ Žď§žĖī 400x400 ŽĻ®ÍįĄžÉČ ŽĻą žĚīŽĮłžßÄŽ•ľ žÉĚžĄĪŪēėÍ≥† žč∂žĚĄ ŽēĆ, žēĄŽěėžôÄ ÍįôžĚÄ žĹĒŽďúŽ•ľ žĚīžö©Ūē† žąė žěąžäĶŽčąŽč§.

image = np.zeros((400,400,3), dtype=np.uint8)

`python

`

- Hue(žÉČžÉĀ) : 8 bitsŽ°ú Ž≥ľŽēĆ R=0(0$^{\circ}$), G=60(120$^{\circ}$), B=120(240$^{\circ}$)
- Saturation(žĪĄŽŹĄ)
- Value(Ž™ÖŽŹĄ)
- Lightness(ŽįĚÍłį)

title: OpenCV Draw figure
text:
Ref: https://docs.opencv.org/master/

## Common options

- @param **img**: np.ndarray
- @param **color**: tuple (B, G, R)
- @param **thickness**: int -1 žĚł Í≤Ĺžöį ŽŹĄŪėē ŽāīŽ∂ÄŽ•ľ žĪĄžõÄ
- @param **lineType**
 - cv.FILLED
 - cv.LINE_4
 - cv.LINE_8
 - cv.LINE_AA
- @param **shift**: int Ž™®Žď† žĘĆŪĎúŽ•ľ (x, y) -> (x¬∑2^(-shift), y¬∑2^(-shift))Ž°ú Ž≥ÄŪôė

## Line

``python
img = cv.arrowedLine(img, pt1, pt2, color, thickness=1, line_type=cv.LINE_8, shift=0, tipLength=0.1)
img = cv.line(img, pt1, pt2, color, thickness=1, lineType=cv.LINE_8, shift=0)
`

- @param **pt1, pt2**: tuple (x, y) start, end

## Rectangle

`python
img = cv.rectangle(img, pt1, pt2, color, thickness=1, lineType=cv.LINE_8, shift=0)
`

- @param **pt1, pt2**: tuple (x, y) top-left, bottom-right

## Polygone

`python
img = cv.polylines(img, pts, isClosed, color, thickness=1, lineType=cv.LINE_8, shift=0)
img = cv.fillPoly(img, pts, color, lineType=cv.LINE_8, shift=0, offset=(0,0))
`

- @param **pts**: list [np.ndarray([[],], dtype=np.int32),] Íľ≠žßÄž†źžúľŽ°ú žĚīŽ£®žĖīžßĄ 2žį®žõź ŽįįžóīŽď§žĚė Ž¶¨žä§Ūäł, Žįįžóī žąėŽßĆŪĀľ ŽŹĄŪėē žÉĚžĄĪ
- @param **isClosed**: bool True : žčúžěĎž†źÍ≥ľ ŽĀĚž†ź žóįÍ≤į, False : žčúžěĎž†źÍ≥ľ ŽĀĚž†ź žóįÍ≤į žēąŪē®
- @param **offset**: tuple (x, y)

## Ellipse

`python
img = cv.circle(img, center, radius, color, thickness=1, lineType=cv.LINE_8, shift=0)
img = cv.ellipse(img, center, axes, angle, startAngle, endAngle, color, thickness=1, lineType=cv.LINE_8, shift=0)
img = cv.ellipse(img, box, color, thickness=1, lineType=cv.LINE_8)
pts = cv.ellipse2Poly(center, axes, angle, arcStart, arcEnd, delta)
`

- @param **center**
- @param **radius**
- @param **axes**
- @param **angle**
- @param **startAngle**
- @param **endAngle**
- @param **box**
- @param **delta**

## Marker

`python
img = cv.drawMarker(img, position, color, markerType=cv.MARKER_CROSS, markerSize=20, thickness=1, line_type=cv.LINE_8)
`

- @param **position**: tuple (x, y)

## žėĀžÉĀ Ūěąžä§ŪÜ†Í∑łŽě®

žėĀžÉĀ Ūěąžä§ŪÜ†Í∑łŽě®žĚÄ X ž∂ē - ŪĒĹžÖÄ Íįí, Y ž∂ē - ŪĒĹžÖÄ žąėŽ°ú ŽßĆŽď† Í∑łŽěėŪĒĄžěÖŽčąŽč§.

Ūěąžä§ŪÜ†Í∑łŽě®žĚĄ Ž≥īŽ©ī ŽŹôžĚľŪēú ŪĒĹžÖÄ ÍįížĚĄ ÍįĖŽäĒ ŪĒĹžÖÄžĚī Ž™áÍįúŽāė ž°īžě¨ŪēėŽäĒžßÄ ŪôēžĚłŪē† žąė žěąÍ≥†, ŪĒĹžÖÄ ÍįížĚī Í≥®Í≥†Ž£® Ž∂ĄŪŹ¨ŽźėžĖīžěąŽäĒžßÄ ŽėźŽäĒ žßĎž§ĎŽźėžĖīžěąŽäĒžßÄ ŪôēžĚłŪē† žąė žěąžäĶŽčąŽč§.

- @param **images**: list [img1,] ÍįĀ žĚīŽĮłžßÄžĚė (ÍįÄŽ°ú, žĄłŽ°ú) ŪĀ¨ÍłįÍįÄ ŽŹôžĚľŪēīžēľŪē®
- @param **channels**: list [ch1,] ŽąĄž†Ā žĪĄŽĄź Ž≤ąŪėł, 0 Ž∂ÄŪĄį žčúžěĎŽź®
- @param **mask**: np.ndarray
 - NonežĚł Í≤Ĺžöį žĚīŽĮłžßÄ ž†Ąž≤ī Ž∂ĄžĄĚ
 - mask = np.zeros(img.shape[:2], dtype=np.uint8)
 - mask[x:x+w, y:y+h] = 255
- @param **histSize**: list [xž∂ē,] ŪĒĹžÖÄ Íįí Žč®Í≥Ą
 - np.uint8 žĚĄ žā¨žö©ŪēėŽäĒ žĚīŽĮłžßÄžĚė 256//8 Ž°ú žĄ§ž†ēŪēėŽ©ī 0~7, 8~15, ... žĚīŽ†áÍ≤Ć Ž¨∂žĖīžĄú 256//8 Žč®Í≥ĄŽ°ú Í≥ĄžāįŽź®
- @param **ranges**: list [min1, max1,] Ž∂ĄžĄĚ Ž≤ĒžúĄ, np.uint8 žĚĄ žā¨žö©ŪēėŽäĒ žĚīŽĮłžßÄžĚė Í≤Ĺžöį žĶúŽĆÄ Ž∂ĄžĄĚ Ž≤ĒžúĄ [0,256]
- @param **accumulate**: bool TrueŽ°ú žĄ§ž†ēŪēėÍ≥† žó¨Žü¨ žĚīŽĮłžßÄŽ•ľ Ž∂ĄžĄĚŪēėŽ©ī ŪēėŽāėžĚė Ūěąžä§ŪÜ†Í∑łŽě®žóź ŽćįžĚīŪĄįÍįÄ ŽąĄž†ĀŽź®

žĚīŽĮłžßÄŽ•ľ žó¨Žü¨Íįú Ž∂ĄžĄĚŪēėŽäĒ Í≤Ĺžöį žěÖŽ†•Ūēú Ž™®Žď† žĚīŽĮłžßÄÍįÄ ŪēėŽāėžĚė ŽįįžóīžĚī Žź©ŽčąŽč§. žėąŽ•ľ Žď§žĖī 3 žĪĄŽĄź žĚīŽĮłžßÄ 2 ÍįúŽ•ľ žĄ§ž†ēŪēėŽ©ī ŪĀ¨ÍłįÍįÄ (ÍįÄŽ°ú, žĄłŽ°ú, 6)Ž°ú žĚłžčĚŪēúŽč§Í≥† žÉĚÍįĀŪēėžčúŽ©ī Žź©ŽčąŽč§.

žĚīŽĮłžßÄ 1 žĚė 1 Ž≤ą žĪĄŽĄźÍ≥ľ žĚīŽĮłžßÄ 2 žĚė 1 Ž≤ą žĪĄŽĄźžĚĄ žĄ†ŪÉĚŪēėŽ†§Ž©ī [0, 3+0]žĚĄ channelsŽ°ú žĄ§ž†ēŪēėŽ©ī Žź©ŽčąŽč§.

hist = cv.calcHist([img], [0, 1], None, [256, 256], [0, 256, 0, 256]) žĚė Í≤įÍ≥ľŽäĒ ÍįĀ žĪĄŽĄźŽ≥Ą Ūěąžä§ŪÜ†Í∑łŽě®žĚī žēĄŽčôŽčąŽč§. Í≤įÍ≥ľŽäĒ (256, 256)žĚł ŽįįžóīžěÖŽčąŽč§. xž∂ē 1 Ž≤ą žĪĄŽĄź, yž∂ē 2 Ž≤ą žĪĄŽĄź, zž∂ē ŪĒĹžÖÄ žąėŽ°ú ÍĶ¨žĄĪŽźú 3žį®žõź Ūěąžä§ŪÜ†Í∑łŽě®žĚĄ Í∑łŽ¶ī žąė žěąžäĶŽčąŽč§.

`python

from matplotlib import pyplot as plt

bgr = cv.imread('image.png')
hist1 = cv.calcHist([bgr], [0], None, [256], [0, 256])
hist2 = cv.calcHist([bgr], [1], None, [256], [0, 256])
hist3 = cv.calcHist([bgr], [2], None, [256], [0, 256])

rgb = cv.cvtColor(bgr, cv.COLOR_BGR2RGB)
plt.subplot(1, 2, 1)
plt.imshow(rgb)
plt.subplot(1, 2, 2)
plt.plot(hist1, 'b')
plt.plot(hist2, 'g')
plt.plot(hist3, 'r')
plt.show()
`

- @return retval cv.THRESH_OTSU ŽėźŽäĒ cv.THRESH_TRIANGLEžĚĄ žā¨žö©ŪĖąžĚĄ ŽēĆ, ž†Āžö©Žźú žó≠žĻė Íįí

from matplotlib import pyplot as plt

gray = cv.imread('image.png', cv.IMREAD_GRAYSCALE)

title: Python OpenTelemetry Trace žĄ§ž†ē ÍįÄžĚīŽďú
text:
## TracerProvider

``shell
pip install opentelemetry-sdk
`

`python
from opentelemetry import trace
from opentelemetry.sdk.trace import TracerProvider
from opentelemetry.sdk.trace.export import BatchSpanProcessor

tracer_provider = TracerProvider()
tracer_provider.add_span_processor(BatchSpanProcessor(exporter))

trace.set_tracer_provider(tracer_provider)
`

- resources žĄ§ž†ēžĚĄ ŽĒįŽ°úŪēėžßÄ žēäžúľŽ©ī ŪôėÍ≤Ĺ Ž≥ÄžąėŽ°úŽ∂ÄŪĄį žĄ§ž†ēžĚĄ žĚĹžĖīžôÄžĄú žĄ§ž†ēŪē©ŽčąŽč§.
 - OTEL_SERVICE_NAME=
 - OTEL_RESOURCE_ATTRIBUTES==[,=]

## Exporter

`shell
pip install opentelemetry-exporter-otlp
`

### gRPC

`python
from opentelemetry.exporter.otlp.proto.grpc.trace_exporter import OTLPSpanExporter

exporter = OTLPSpanExporter()
`

**žėĶžÖėžĚĄ žĄ§ž†ēŪēėžßÄ žēäžúľŽ©ī ŪôėÍ≤Ĺ Ž≥ÄžąėŽ°úŽ∂ÄŪĄį žĄ§ž†ēžĚĄ žĚĹžĖīžôÄžĄú žĄ§ž†ēŪē©ŽčąŽč§. ŪôėÍ≤Ĺ Ž≥Äžąė žöįžĄ†žąúžúĄŽäĒ OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_*, OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_TRACES_* žąúžúľŽ°ú ŽÜížēĄžßĎŽčąŽč§.**

- endpoint žĄ§ž†ē
 - ÍłįŽ≥łÍįížĚÄ insecure + localhost:4317 žěÖŽčąŽč§.
 - OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT=://:
 - OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_TRACES_ENDPOINT=://:
 - žĚī httpžĚł Í≤Ĺžöį insecureŽ°ú žĄ§ž†ēŽź©ŽčąŽč§.
 - ÍįĀÍįĀ Ž∂ĄŽ¶¨ŪēīžĄú žĄ§ž†ēŪē† žąėŽŹĄ žěąžäĶŽčąŽč§.
 - OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_INSECURE=true|false
 - OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT=:
 - OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_TRACES_INSECURE=true|false
 - OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_TRACES_ENDPOINT=:
- headers žĄ§ž†ē
 - OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_HEADERS==[,=]
 - OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_TRACES_HEADERS==[,=]
- timeout žĄ§ž†ē
 - ÍłįŽ≥łÍįížĚÄ 10žīą žěÖŽčąŽč§.
 - OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_TIMEOUT=
 - OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_TRACES_TIMEOUT=
- compression žĄ§ž†ē
 - OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_COMPRESSION=gzip|none
 - OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_TRACES_COMPRESSION=gzip|none
- certificate žĄ§ž†ē
 - OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_CERTIFICATE=
 - OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_CLIENT_CERTIFICATE=.pem
 - OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_CLIENT_KEY=.pem
 - OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_TRACES_CERTIFICATE=
 - OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_TRACES_CLIENT_CERTIFICATE=.pem
 - OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_TRACES_CLIENT_KEY=.pem

## Sampler

- **TracerProvideržóź samplerŽ•ľ žĄ§ž†ēŪēėžßÄ žēäžúľŽ©ī ŪôėÍ≤Ĺ Ž≥ÄžąėŽ°úŽ∂ÄŪĄį žĄ§ž†ēžĚĄ žĚĹžĖīžôÄžĄú žĄ§ž†ēŪē©ŽčąŽč§.**
 - OTEL_TRACES_SAMPLER=always_on|always_off|traceidratio|parentbased_always_on|parentbased_always_off|parentbased_traceidratio

## socket

ŪĆĆžĚīžć¨žóź ÍłįŽ≥ł Žāīžě•ŽźėžĖīžěąŽäĒ socket Ž™®ŽďąžĚĄ ŪÜĶŪēī ÍįĄŽč®Ūēú ŽłĒŽ£®Ūą¨žä§ ŪÜĶžč†žĚĄ ÍĶ¨ž∂ē Ūē† žąė žěąžäĶŽčąŽč§.

Žč® žįłÍ≥†Ūē† Ž¨łžĄúÍįÄ ÍĪįžĚė žóÜÍłį ŽēĆŽ¨łžóź Žč®žąú ŪÜĶžč† ÍłįŽä• žôłžóźŽäĒ ŪĒĄŽ°úÍ∑łŽě® ÍįúŽįúžĚī žĖīŽ†§žöł žąė žěąžäĶŽčąŽč§.

## pybluez žĄ§žĻė

`

### bluetooth.service Ž≥ÄÍ≤Ĺ

žč§ŪĖČ žėĶžÖėžúľŽ°ú -C(--compat)Ž•ľ ž∂ĒÍįÄŪē©ŽčąŽč§.

## ŽłĒŽ£®Ūą¨žä§ žĽ®ŪäłŽ°§Žü¨

žēĄŽěė Ž™ÖŽ†ĻžĚĄ ŪÜĶŪēī ŽłĒŽ£®Ūą¨žä§ žě•žĻėŽ™ÖÍ≥ľ MAC ž£ľžÜĆŽ•ľ ŪôēžĚłŪē©ŽčąŽč§.

### bluetoothctl

bluetoothctl Ž™ÖŽ†ĻžĖīŽ•ľ ŪÜĶŪēī ŽłĒŽ£®Ūą¨žä§ žě•žĻėŽ•ľ ž†úžĖīŪē† žąė žěąžäĶŽčąŽč§.

ž†ēŽ≥īÍįÄ žēąŽāėžė§Ž©ī sudo bluetoothctl Ž™ÖŽ†ĻžĖīŽ•ľ ŪÜĶŪēī ŽłĒŽ£®Ūą¨žä§ žě•žĻėŽ•ľ ž†úžĖīŪē† žąė žěąžäĶŽčąŽč§.

## Examples

### server - client

#### server

`python

HOST = "" # 'ŽłĒŽ£®Ūą¨žä§ žĽ®ŪäłŽ°§Žü¨ Žß• ž£ľžÜĆ'Ž•ľ žßĀž†Ď žěÖŽ†•ŪēīŽŹĄ Žź®
PORT = bluetooth.PORT_ANY
UUID = "94f39d29-7d6d-437d-973b-fba39e49d4ee"

def signal_handler(sig, frame):
 try:
 connected_socket.close()

 except:
 pass

 server_socket.close()
 sys.exit()

signal.signal(signal.SIGINT, signal_handler)

# ŽłĒŽ£®Ūą¨žä§ žĄúŽ≤Ą žÜĆžľď žÉĚžĄĪ
server_socket = bluetooth.BluetoothSocket(bluetooth.RFCOMM)
server_socket.bind((HOST, PORT))
server_socket.listen(1)

port = server_socket.getsockname()[1]
print("ŪŹ¨Ūäł :", port)

# ŽłĒŽ£®Ūą¨žä§ žĄúŽĻĄžä§ advertise
bluetooth.advertise_service(
 server_socket,
 name="server",
 service_id=UUID,
 service_classes=[UUID, bluetooth.SERIAL_PORT_CLASS],
 profiles=[bluetooth.SERIAL_PORT_PROFILE],
)

# ŪĀīŽĚľžĚīžĖłŪäł ž†ĎžÜć ŽĆÄÍłį
connected_socket, client_address = server_socket.accept()

try:
 while True:
 data = connected_socket.recv(1024)
 print("client : ", data)
 connected_socket.send(data)

except:
 pass

connected_socket.close()
server_socket.close()
`

#### client

`python

# žĄúŽ≤Ą ž†ēŽ≥ī
HOST = "" # ŽłĒŽ£®Ūą¨žä§ žĽ®ŪäłŽ°§Žü¨ Žß• ž£ľžÜĆ
UUID = "94f39d29-7d6d-437d-973b-fba39e49d4ee"

def signal_handler(sig, frame):
 client_socket.close()
 sys.exit()

signal.signal(signal.SIGINT, signal_handler)

# portŽäĒ Ž™®Ž•īÍ≥† namežĚīŽāė uuidŽ•ľ žēĄŽäĒ Í≤Ĺžöį
# address Ž•ľ žĄ§ž†ēŪēėÍ≥† ŽāėŽ®łžßÄŽ•ľ NonežúľŽ°ú ŪēėŽäĒ Í≤Ĺžöį Í≤įÍ≥ľÍįÄ žó¨Žü¨Íįú Žāėžė¨ žąė žěąžĚĆ
# name=NonežĚÄ NonežĚł Í≤įÍ≥ľŽ•ľ žįĺŽäĒ Í≤ÉžĚī žēĄŽčė. NonežĚī žēĄŽčąŽćĒŽĚľŽŹĄ ŽāėŽ®łžßÄ ž†ēŽ≥īŽßĆ žĚľžĻėŪēėŽ©ī Í≤įÍ≥ľžóź ŪŹ¨Ūē® Žź®
# Í≤įÍ≥ľŽäĒ, 'host', 'name', 'description', 'provider',
# 'protocol', 'service-classes', 'profiles', 'service_id'Ž•ľ Ūā§Ž°úŪēėŽäĒ ŽĒēžÖĒŽĄąŽ¶¨
# addressžôÄ Žč§Ž•ł ŪēėŽāėžĚė ž†ēŽ≥īŽßĆ žēĆŽ©ī ÍĪįžĚė ŪēėŽāėŽ°ú ŪäĻž†ēžßÄžĖīžßź
services = bluetooth.find_service(name=None, uuid=UUID, address=HOST)

if len(services) == 0:
 print("žě•žĻėŽ•ľ žįĺžßÄ Ž™ĽŪĖąžäĶŽčąŽč§.")
 sys.exit()

service = services[0]
port = service["port"]
print("ŪŹ¨Ūäł :", port)

# ŽłĒŽ£®Ūą¨žä§ ŪĀīŽĚľžĚīžĖłŪäł žÜĆžľď žÉĚžĄĪ
client_socket = bluetooth.BluetoothSocket(bluetooth.RFCOMM)

# žĄúŽ≤Ą ž†ĎžÜć
client_socket.connect((HOST, port))

try:
 while True:
 data = input("client : ")
 if data:
 client_socket.send(data.encode())
 data = client_socket.recv(1024)
 print("server :", data)

except:
 pass

client_socket.close()
`

### žÜ°žąėžč† žďįŽ†ąŽďú

`python

class Bluetooth_socket(threading.Thread):
 def __init__(self):
 super().__init__()
 self._host = ""
 self._port = bluetooth.PORT_ANY
 self._uuid = "00000001-0000-1000-8000-00805F9B34FB"

 # žąėžč† ŽćįžĚīŪĄį ž†Äžě•žö© ŪĀź
 self._recv_queue = queue.Queue()
 self.daemon = True

 # ŽłĒŽ£®Ūą¨žä§ žĄúŽ≤Ą žÜĆžľď žÉĚžĄĪ
 self._socket = bluetooth.BluetoothSocket(bluetooth.RFCOMM)
 self._socket.bind((self._host, self._port))
 self._socket.listen(1)
 bluetooth.advertise_service(
 self._socket,
 name="bluetooth_server",
 service_id=self._uuid,
 service_classes=[self._uuid, bluetooth.SERIAL_PORT_CLASS],
 profiles=[bluetooth.SERIAL_PORT_PROFILE],
 )

 self._connection_start_callback = None
 self._connection_stop_callback = None

 self._is_connected = False

 def run(self):
 while True:
 # ŽłĒŽ£®Ūą¨žä§ žóįÍ≤į ŽĆÄÍłį
 self._connected_socket, client_address = self._socket.accept()
 self._is_connected = True

 self._start_callback()

 try:
 while True:
 data = self._connected_socket.recv(1024)
 self._recv_queue.put(data)

 except:
 pass

 self._stop_callback()

 self._is_connected = False
 self._connected_socket.close()

 def close(self):
 self._connected_socket.close()
 self._socket.close()

 # žąėžč† ŽćįžĚīŪĄį
 def recv(self):
 try:
 data = self._recv_queue.get(block=False)

 except queue.Empty:
 return None

 return data

 # žÜ°žč† ŽćįžĚīŪĄį
 def send(self, data):
 if self._is_connected:
 self._connected_socket.send(data)

 # žóįÍ≤į žčúžěĎ žčú Ūėłž∂úŽźėŽäĒ žĹúŽįĪ žĄ§ž†ē
 def set_connection_start_callback(self, callback=None, args=()):
 self._connection_start_callback = callback
 self._connection_start_callback_args = args

 def _start_callback(self):
 if self._connection_start_callback is not None:
 self._connection_start_callback(
 *self._connection_start_callback_args
 )

 # žóįÍ≤į žĘÖŽ£Ć žčú Ūėłž∂úŽźėŽäĒ žĹúŽįĪ žĄ§ž†ē
 def set_connection_stop_callback(self, callback=None, args=()):
 self._connection_stop_callback = callback
 self._connection_stop_callback_args = args

 def _stop_callback(self):
 if self._connection_stop_callback is not None:
 self._connection_stop_callback(*self._connection_stop_callback_args)

 def is_connected(self):
 return self._is_connected
``

title: PySide2 Custom QDialog
text:
## Create QDialog UI

- New file or project (Ctrl + N)->Qt->Qt Designer Form-> Dialog without Buttons
- Add okPushButton and cancelPushButton

## Example

``python title="settings_dialog.py"

from PySide2.QtCore import Qt
from PySide2.QtWidgets import QDialog

from ui_settings_dialog import Ui_SettingsDialog

class SettingsDialog(QDialog, Ui_SettingsDialog):
 def __init__(self, parent=None) -> None:
 super().__init__(parent=parent)
 self.setupUi(self)
 self.setModal(True)
 self.setWindowFlag(Qt.FramelessWindowHint)

 # When accepted, self.result() is 1.
 self.okPushButton.clicked.connect(self.accept)
 # When rejected, self.result() is 0.
 self.cancelPushButton.clicked.connect(self.reject)

 self._settings = None

 def setSettings(self, settings):
 # Copies settings. Do not edit settings.
 self._settings = copy.deepcopy(settings)

 def getSettings(self):
 return self._settings
`

`python title="main_window.py"

from PySide2.QtWidgets import QMainWindow, QApplication

from ui_main_window import Ui_MainWindow
from settings_dialog import SettingsDialog

class MainWindow(QMainWindow, Ui_MainWindow):
 def __init__(self):
 super().__init__()
 self.setupUi(self)

 ...

 self.settingsDialog = SettingsDialog(self)
 self.settingsDialog.finished.connect(self.finishedSettingsDialog)

 self.settingsPushButton.clicked.connect(self.openSettingsDialog)

 def openSettingsDialog(self):
 self.settingsDialog.setSettings(self.settings)
 self.settingsDialog.open()

 def finishedSettingsDialog(self):
 if self.settingsDialog.result():
 self.settings = self.settingsDialog.getSettings()

if __name__ == "__main__":
 app = QApplication(sys.argv)
 mainWindow = MainWindow()
 mainWindow.show()
 sys.exit(app.exec_())
``

title: PySide2 QRunnable and QThreadPool
text:
## Examples

``python

from PySide2.QtWidgets import QMainWindow, QApplication
from PySide2.QtCore import (
 QObject,
 QThread,
 QRunnable,
 QThreadPool,
 Slot,
 Signal,
)

from ui_mainwindow import Ui_MainWindow

class TaskSignal(QObject):
 """
 QRunnabležóźžĄú žā¨žö©Ūē† žčúÍ∑łŽĄź
 """

 finished = Signal(bool)

class Task(QRunnable):
 _taskSignal = TaskSignal()
 finished = _taskSignal.finished

 var = False

 def run(self):
 """
 žě†žčú ž§ĎŽč®ŪēėŽäĒ Í≤Ĺžöį QThread.msleep() žā¨žö©
 """
 QThread.msleep(5000)

 self.finished.emit(self.var)

class MainWindow(QMainWindow, Ui_MainWindow):
 def __init__(self):
 super().__init__()
 self.setupUi(self)
 self.pushButton.setText("Ž≤ĄŪäľ 1")

 self.pushButton.clicked.connect(self.startTask)

 self.task = Task()
 self.task.setAutoDelete(False)
 self.task.finished.connect(self.taskFinished)

 def startTask(self):
 if self.task.var:
 self.task.var = False
 else:
 self.task.var = True

 """
 task žč§ŪĖČ
 """
 QThreadPool.globalInstance().start(self.task)

 """
 Ž≤ĄŪäľ ŽĻĄŪôúžĄĪŪôĒ
 """
 self.pushButton.setEnabled(False)

 @Slot(bool)
 def taskFinished(self, is_success):
 if is_success:
 self.textBrowser.append("success")
 else:
 self.textBrowser.append("fail")

 self.pushButton.setEnabled(True)

if __name__ == "__main__":
 app = QApplication(sys.argv)
 mainWindow = MainWindow()
 mainWindow.show()
 sys.exit(app.exec_())
``

- https://doc.qt.io/qtforpython/PySide2/QtCore/QThreadPool.html
- https://doc.qt.io/qtforpython/PySide2/QtCore/QRunnable.html

## Evenv loop
Being an event-driven toolkit, events and event delivery play a central role in Qt architecture.

žĚīŽ≤§Ūäł Ž£®ŪĒĄžĚė žĽ®žÖČžĚÄ žēĄŽěėžôÄ ÍįôžäĶŽčąŽč§.

while isRunning:
 while not eventQueueIsEmpty:
 """
 eventQueue ŪôēžĚł
 event ž≤ėŽ¶¨
 """

 # eventÍįÄ ŽįúžÉĚŪē† ŽēĆÍĻĆžßÄ ŽĆÄÍłį

`

ŪĒĄŽ°úÍ∑łŽě®žĚĄ žč§ŪĖČžčúŪā§Ž©ī žä§ŪÉĚžĚī žēĄŽěė Žį©ŪĖ•žúľŽ°ú ž¶ĚÍįÄŪē† ŽēĆ, žēĄŽěėžôÄ ÍįôžĚÄ Žį©žčĚžúľŽ°ú žä§ŪÉĚžĚī žĆďžěÖŽčąŽč§.

1. main(int, char *)
1. QApplication::exec()
1. \[‚Ä¶\]
1. QWidget::event(QEvent *)
1. Button::mousePressEvent(QMouseEvent *)
1. Button::clicked()
1. \[‚Ä¶\]
1. Worker::doWork()

QApplication::exec()žóź žĚėŪēī Ž©ĒžĚł žĚīŽ≤§Ūäł Ž£®ŪĒĄÍįÄ žč§ŪĖČŽź©ŽčąŽč§. žĚīŽ≤§Ūäł Ž£®ŪĒĄÍįÄ žč§ŪĖČŽźėŽäĒ ŽŹôžēą Žßąžöįžä§Ž°ú Ž≤ĄŪäľžĚĄ ŪĀīŽ¶≠ŪēėŽ©ī ž†ĀŽčĻŪēú ž†ąžį®žóź ŽĒįŽĚľ QWidget::event(QEvent *)Ž•ľ Ūėłž∂úŪēėÍ≤Ć Žź©ŽčąŽč§. Reentrant(žě¨žßĄžěÖ) : A class is reentrant if it's safe to use its instances from more than one thread, provided that at most one thread is accessing the same instance at the same time. A function is reentrant if it's safe to invoke it from more than one thread at the same, provided that each invocation references unique data. In other words, this means that users of that class/function must serialize all accesses to instances/shared data by means of some external locking mechanism.
Thread-safe(žďįŽ†ąŽďú žēąž†Ą) : A class is thread-safe if it's safe to use its instances from more than one thread at the same time. A function is thread-safe if it's safe to invoke it from more than one thread at the same time even if the invocations reference shared data.

QTžóźžĄú žĚėŽŹĄŪēėžßÄ žēäžĚÄ žā¨žö©Žį©Ž≤ēžĚľ žąė žěąžäĶŽčąŽč§. ž∂ĒŪõĄ Í≤ÄŪÜ†ŪēīžĄú žąėž†ēŪēėÍ≤†žäĶŽčąŽč§.

`python

from PySide2.QtWidgets import QMainWindow, QApplication
from PySide2.QtCore import QThread, Slot, Signal

from ui_mainwindow import Ui_MainWindow

class BackgroundThread(QThread):
 signalInA = Signal(str)

 def __init__(self):
 super().__init__()

 def run(self):
 while True:
 self.msleep(1000)
 """
 signal : A event loop -> main event loop
 queued connection
 """
 self.signalInA.emit("A event loop")

class MainWindow(QMainWindow, Ui_MainWindow):
 _backgroundThread = BackgroundThread()

 def __init__(self):
 super().__init__()

 self.setupUi(self)
 self.pushButton.setText("Ž≤ĄŪäľ 1")
 self.pushButton2.setText("Ž≤ĄŪäľ 2")

 self.pushButton.clicked.connect(self.pushButtonClicked)
 self.pushButton2.clicked.connect(self.pushButton2Clicked)

 self._backgroundThread.signalInA.connect(self.appendTextBrowser)

 if not self._backgroundThread.isRunning():
 self._backgroundThread.start()

 def pushButtonClicked(self):
 """
 žďįŽ†ąŽďúÍįÄ žč§ŪĖČ ž§ĎžĚīžßÄ žēäŽč§Ž©ī žč§ŪĖČ
 """
 if not self._backgroundThread.isRunning():
 self._backgroundThread.start()

 def pushButton2Clicked(self):
 """
 signal : main event loop -> main event loop
 direct connection
 """
 self._backgroundThread.signalInA.emit("main event loop")
 """
 Ž¨łž†ú terminate žā¨žö©žúľŽ°ú žĚłŪēú Ž¨łž†úÍįÄ ŽįúžÉĚŪē† žąė žěąžĚĆ.
 """
 self._backgroundThread.terminate()

 @Slot(str)
 def appendTextBrowser(self, text):
 """
 main event loopžóźžĄú žč§ŪĖČŽźėŽäĒ žä¨Ž°Į
 """
 self.textBrowser.append("signal from " + text)

if __name__ == "__main__":
 app = QApplication(sys.argv)
 mainWindow = MainWindow()
 mainWindow.show()
 app_return = app.exec_()

 """
 žĘÖŽ£Ć ž†Ą žďįŽ†ąŽďú Íįēž†ú žĘÖŽ£Ć
 """
 mainWindow._backgroundThread.terminate()
 sys.exit(app_return)
``

## Single shot timer

singleShot()žĚÄ žĚľž†ē žčúÍįĄžĚī žßÄŽāú ŪõĄ, žěĎžóÖžĚī žčúžěĎŽźėŽŹĄŽ°Ě Ūē† žąė žěąÍ≤Ć Ūēīž£ľŽäĒ Ūē®žąėžěÖŽčąŽč§. static Ūē®žąėžĚīÍłį ŽēĆŽ¨łžóź žĚłžä§ŪĄīžä§Ž•ľ ŽßĆŽď§žßÄ žēäÍ≥† žā¨žö©Ūē† žąė žěąžäĶŽčąŽč§.

žēĄŽěė žĹĒŽďúŽäĒ ŪĎłžčú Ž≤ĄŪäľÍ≥ľ ŪÖćžä§Ūäł ŽłĆŽĚľžöįž†Ä žúĄž†ĮžĚī žěąžĚĄ ŽēĆ, Ž≤ĄŪäľžĚĄ ŽąĄŽ•īŽ©ī 1 žīą ŪõĄžóź ŪÖćžä§ŪäłŽ•ľ ŽĚĄžöįŽäĒ žĹĒŽďúžěÖŽčąŽč§.

``python

from PySide2.QtWidgets import QMainWindow, QApplication
from PySide2.QtCore import QTimer, SLOT

from ui_mainwindow import Ui_MainWindow

class MainWindow(QMainWindow, Ui_MainWindow):
 def __init__(self):
 super().__init__()

 self.setupUi(self)
 self.pushButton.setText("Ž≤ĄŪäľ 1")

 self.pushButton.clicked.connect(self.pushButtonClicked)

 def pushButtonClicked(self):
 """
 1 žīą ŪÉÄžěĄžēĄžõÉÍ≥ľ appendTextBrowser žóįÍ≤į
 QTimer.singleShot(1000, self, SLOT("appendTextBrowser()"))
 QTimer.singleShot(
 1000, Qt.PreciseTimer, self, SLOT("appendTextBrowser()")
 )
 """
 QTimer.singleShot(1000, self.appendTextBrowser)

 def appendTextBrowser(self):
 self.textBrowser.append("1 žīą ŪõĄ")

if __name__ == "__main__":
 app = QApplication(sys.argv)
 mainWindow = MainWindow()
 mainWindow.show()
 sys.exit(app.exec_())
`

## Repetitive timer

ŽįėŽ≥Ķ žč§ŪĖČžĚÄ žĚłžä§ŪĄīžä§ Ūē®žąėŽ•ľ žā¨žö©ŪēėÍłį ŽēĆŽ¨łžóź QTimeržĚė žĚłžä§ŪĄīžä§Ž•ľ žÉĚžĄĪŪēīžēľŪē©ŽčąŽč§.

žēĄŽěė žĹĒŽďúŽäĒ ŪĎłžčú Ž≤ĄŪäľÍ≥ľ ŪÖćžä§Ūäł ŽłĆŽĚľžöįž†Ä žúĄž†ĮžĚī žěąžĚĄ ŽēĆ, Ž≤ĄŪäľžĚĄ ŽąĄŽ•īŽ©ī 1 žīą ÍįĄÍ≤©žúľŽ°ú 3 ŪöĆ ŪÖćžä§ŪäłŽ•ľ ŽĚĄžöįŽäĒ žĹĒŽďúžěÖŽčąŽč§.

`python

from PySide2.QtWidgets import QMainWindow, QApplication
from PySide2.QtCore import QTimer

from ui_mainwindow import Ui_MainWindow

class MainWindow(QMainWindow, Ui_MainWindow):
 def __init__(self):
 super().__init__()

 self.setupUi(self)
 self.pushButton.setText("Ž≤ĄŪäľ 1")

 self.pushButton.clicked.connect(self.pushButtonClicked)

 self.isPushButtonClicked = False

 self.pushButtonTimer = QTimer(self)
 self.pushButtonTimer.setInterval(1000)
 self.pushButtonTimer.timeout.connect(self.appendTextBrowser)

 self.count = 0

 def pushButtonClicked(self):
 if not self.isPushButtonClicked:
 self.isPushButtonClicked = True
 self.pushButton.setEnabled(False)

 """
 ŽįėŽ≥Ķ žčúžěĎ
 """
 self.pushButtonTimer.start()

 def appendTextBrowser(self):
 self.count += 1
 self.textBrowser.append(str(self.count) + " žīą ŪõĄ")

 if self.count == 3:
 """
 ŽįėŽ≥Ķ žĘÖŽ£Ć
 """
 self.pushButtonTimer.stop()
 self.isPushButtonClicked = False
 self.pushButton.setEnabled(True)
 self.count = 0

if __name__ == "__main__":
 app = QApplication(sys.argv)
 mainWindow = MainWindow()
 mainWindow.show()
 sys.exit(app.exec_())
``

## Signal and Slot

žčúÍ∑łŽĄźÍ≥ľ žä¨Ž°ĮžĚĄ žā¨žö©ŪēėŽ©ī ÍįĚž≤īÍįĄ ŪÜĶžč†žĚĄ Ūē† žąė žěąžäĶŽčąŽč§.

- ŪēėŽāėžĚė žčúÍ∑łŽĄźžĚĄ žó¨Žü¨ žä¨Ž°Įžóź žóįÍ≤įŪē† žąė žěąžäĶŽčąŽč§.
- žčúÍ∑łŽĄźžĚÄ Žč§Ž•ł žčúÍ∑łŽĄźžóź žóįÍ≤įŪē† žąė žěąžäĶŽčąŽč§.
- žčúÍ∑łŽĄźžĚÄ QObjectžĚė ŪĆĆžÉĚ ŪĀīŽěėžä§žóź ŪĀīŽěėžä§ Ž≥Äžąėžóź Ūē†ŽčĻŪēīžēľ Ūē©ŽčąŽč§.
- ŪēėŽāėžĚė žä¨Ž°ĮžĚĄ žó¨Žü¨ žčúÍ∑łŽĄźžóź žóįÍ≤įŪē† žąė žěąžäĶŽčąŽč§.
- @Slot ŽćįžĹĒŽ†ąžĚīŪĄįŽ•ľ žā¨žö©ŪēėžßÄ žēäžēĄŽŹĄ žä¨Ž°ĮžúľŽ°ú žďł žąė žěąžäĶŽčąŽč§.
- žďįŽ†ąŽďú žā¨žĚīžĚė ŪÜĶžč†žĚĄ žúĄŪēī žčúÍ∑łŽĄźÍ≥ľ žä¨Ž°ĮžĚĄ žā¨žö©Ūē† žąė žěąžäĶŽčąŽč§.

A žčúÍ∑łŽĄźžóź a žä¨Ž°ĮžĚĄ žó¨Žü¨Ž≤ą žóįÍ≤įŪēėŽ©ī, žčúÍ∑łŽĄźžĚī ŽįúžÉĚŪĖąžĚĄ ŽēĆ žóįÍ≤įŽźú Ūöüžąė ŽßĆŪĀľ žä¨Ž°ĮžĚĄ Ūėłž∂úŪē©ŽčąŽč§.

## Examples

``python

from PySide2.QtWidgets import QMainWindow, QApplication
from PySide2.QtCore import Signal, Slot

from ui_mainwindow import Ui_MainWindow

class MainWindow(QMainWindow, Ui_MainWindow):
 """
 Ui ŪĀīŽěėžä§ žÉĀžÜć ŽįŹ
 žā¨žö©žěź ž†ēžĚė žčúÍ∑łŽĄź žÉĚžĄĪ
 """

 # clickedSignal = Signal((int,), (str,))
 pushButtonClickedSignal = Signal(int)
 pushButton2ClickedSignal = Signal(str)

 def __init__(self):
 super().__init__()
 """
 Ui žĄ§ž†ē
 """
 self.setupUi(self)
 self.pushButton.setText("Ž≤ĄŪäľ 1")
 self.pushButton2.setText("Ž≤ĄŪäľ 2")

 """
 Ž≤ĄŪäľ ŪĀīŽ¶≠ žčúÍ∑łŽĄźžóź žä¨Ž°Į ž∂ĒÍįÄ
 """
 self.pushButton.clicked.connect(self.pushButtonClicked)
 self.pushButton2.clicked.connect(self.pushButton2Clicked)

 """
 žā¨žö©žěź ž†ēžĚė žčúÍ∑łŽĄźžóź žä¨Ž°Į ž∂ĒÍįÄ
 """
 # self.clickedSignal[int].connect(self.appendTextBrowser)
 # self.clickedSignal[str].connect(self.appendTextBrowser)
 self.pushButtonClickedSignal.connect(self.appendTextBrowser)
 self.pushButton2ClickedSignal.connect(self.appendTextBrowser)

 self.count = 0

 def pushButtonClicked(self):
 """
 Slot ŽćįžĹĒŽ†ąžĚīŪĄįÍįÄ žóÜžúľŽ©ī Žß§ÍįúŽ≥ÄžąėÍįÄ žóÜŽäĒ žä¨Ž°ĮžúľŽ°ú Ž≥ľ žąė žěąžĚĆ
 """
 self.count += 1
 """
 pushButtonClickedSignal ž∂úŽ†•
 Signal.emit(ž†ēžĚėŽźú Ž≥Äžąė)
 """
 # self.clickedSignal[int].emit(self.count)
 self.pushButtonClickedSignal.emit(self.count)

 def pushButton2Clicked(self):
 self.count = 0
 # self.clickedSignal[str].emit("init count")
 self.pushButton2ClickedSignal.emit("init count")

 @Slot(int)
 @Slot(str)
 def appendTextBrowser(self, var):
 """
 int ŽėźŽäĒ stržĚĄ Žß§ÍįúŽ≥ÄžąėŽ°ú ŽįõžĚĄ žąė žěąŽäĒ žä¨Ž°Į žÉĚžĄĪ
 """
 if isinstance(var, int):
 self.textBrowser.append("count : " + str(var))
 else:
 self.textBrowser.append(var)

if __name__ == "__main__":
 app = QApplication(sys.argv)
 mainWindow = MainWindow()
 mainWindow.show()
 sys.exit(app.exec_())

`python

from PySide2.QtWidgets import QMainWindow, QApplication
from PySide2.QtCore import Signal, Slot

from ui_mainwindow import Ui_MainWindow

class MainWindow(QMainWindow, Ui_MainWindow):
 """
 2 ÍįúžĚė Žß§ÍįúŽ≥ÄžąėŽ•ľ ÍįĖŽäĒ žčúÍ∑łŽĄź žÉĚžĄĪ
 """

 clickedSignal = Signal((int, int), (str, int))

 def __init__(self):
 super().__init__()

 self.setupUi(self)
 self.pushButton.setText("Ž≤ĄŪäľ 1")
 self.pushButton2.setText("Ž≤ĄŪäľ 2")

 self.pushButton.clicked.connect(self.pushButtonClicked)
 self.pushButton2.clicked.connect(self.pushButton2Clicked)

 self.clickedSignal[int, int].connect(self.appendTextBrowser)
 self.clickedSignal[str, int].connect(self.appendTextBrowser)

 self.count1 = 0
 self.count2 = 0

 def pushButtonClicked(self):
 self.count1 += 1
 self.count2 += 1
 self.clickedSignal[int, int].emit(self.count1, self.count2)

 def pushButton2Clicked(self):
 self.count1 = 0
 self.clickedSignal[str, int].emit("set count1", self.count1)

 @Slot(int, int)
 @Slot(str, int)
 def appendTextBrowser(self, var1, var2):
 if isinstance(var1, int):
 self.textBrowser.append("count1: {}, count2: {}".format(var1, var2))
 else:
 self.textBrowser.append("{} to {}".format(var1, var2))

if __name__ == "__main__":
 app = QApplication(sys.argv)
 mainWindow = MainWindow()
 mainWindow.show()
 sys.exit(app.exec_())
``

- 7 Í≥ĄžłĶ, Application : ŪÜĶžč† ŪĒĄŽ°úŪÜ†žĹúÍ≥ľ žĚłŪĄįŪéėžĚīžä§ ŽčīŽčĻŪēėŽäĒ Í≥ĄžłĶ
- 6 Í≥ĄžłĶ, Presentation : ŽćįžĚīŪĄį Ž≥ÄŪôė, žēĒŪėłŪôĒ ŽďĪžĚĄ ŽŹēŽäĒ Í≥ĄžłĶ
- 5 Í≥ĄžłĶ, Session : žĖĎ ŽĀĚŽč® žĚĎžö© ŪĒĄŽ°úžĄłžä§žóźÍ≤Ć ŪÜĶžč† žóįÍ≤į, žú†žßÄ ŽďĪžóź ŽĆÄŪēú Žį©Ž≤ēžĚĄ ž†úÍ≥ĶŪēėŽäĒ Í≥ĄžłĶ
- 4 Í≥ĄžłĶ, Transport : ŽćįžĚīŪĄįŽ•ľ ž†ĄžÜ°ŪēėŽäĒ Žį©Ž≤ēžĚĄ ž†úÍ≥ĶŪēėŽäĒ Í≥ĄžłĶ
- 3 Í≥ĄžłĶ, Network : Žč§ž§Ď ŽÖłŽďú ŽĄ§ŪäłžõĆŪĀ¨žĚė ÍĶ¨ž°įŪôĒžôÄ ÍīÄŽ¶¨Ž•ľ žúĄŪēī ž£ľžÜĆ žßÄž†ē, ŽĚľžöįŪĆÖÍ≥ľ ŪäłŽěėŪĒĹ ž†úžĖīŽ•ľ ŽčīŽčĻŪēėŽäĒ Í≥ĄžłĶ
- 2 Í≥ĄžłĶ, Data link : 1 Í≥ĄžłĶžóź žĚėŪēī žóįÍ≤įŽźú ŽĎź ŽÖłŽďú žā¨žĚīžĚė žč†ŽĘįžĄĪ žěąŽäĒ ž†ĄžÜ°žĚĄ žúĄŪēú Í≥ĄžłĶ
- 1 Í≥ĄžłĶ, Physical : ŪēėŽďúžõ®žĖī ž†ĄžÜ° Íłįžą†Ž°ú ÍĶ¨žĄĪŽźú Í≥ĄžłĶ

## žÜĆžľď ŪÜĶžč†

- @brief žĄúŽ≤ĄÍįÄ žóįÍ≤įžĚĄ Ūóąžö©Ūē† žąė žěąŽŹĄŽ°Ě žĄ§ž†ē

## TCP, UDP

| TCP(Transmission Control Protocol) | UDP(User Datagram Protocol) |
| ---------------------------------- | --------------------------- |
| žóįÍ≤įŪėē | ŽĻĄžóįÍ≤įŪėē |
| 1:1 | 1:1, 1:N, N:N |
| ŽÜížĚÄ žč†ŽĘįžĄĪ | . |
| . | ŽćĒ ŽĻ†Ž•ł žÜćŽŹĄ |

## TCP server - client ÍłįŽ≥ł žėąž†ú

### server

`python

log = logging.getLogger(__name__)

logging.basicConfig(
 format='[%(levelname)-8s] %(filename)-10s %(lineno) 4d ŪĖČ : %(message)s',
 level=logging.DEBUG)

# žĄúŽ≤Ą IP, PORT
_HOST = "xxx.xxx.xxx.xxx"
_PORT = 12345

server_socket = socket.socket(socket.AF_INET, socket.SOCK_STREAM)

server_socket.setsockopt(socket.SOL_SOCKET, socket.SO_REUSEADDR, 1)

server_socket.bind((_HOST, _PORT))
server_socket.listen()

def signal_handler(sig, frame):
 server_socket.close()
 time.sleep(1)
 sys.exit()

signal.signal(signal.SIGINT, signal_handler)

def recv_thread(connected_socket):
 while True:
 try:
 data = connected_socket.recv(1024)
 if data == b'':
 break
 log.debug(data)
 except:
 break

while True:
 log.info("žóįÍ≤į ŽĆÄÍłį")
 connected_socket, client_address = server_socket.accept()
 log.info("{} žóįÍ≤į".format(client_address))

 t = threading.Thread(target=recv_thread, args=(
 connected_socket,), daemon=True)
 t.start()
 while t.isAlive():
 try:
 connected_socket.send("hello client\n".encode())
 time.sleep(1)
 except:
 break
`

### client

`python

log = logging.getLogger(__name__)

logging.basicConfig(
 format='[%(levelname)-8s] %(filename)-10s %(lineno) 4d ŪĖČ : %(message)s',
 level=logging.DEBUG)

# žĄúŽ≤Ą IP, PORT
_HOST = "xxx.xxx.xxx.xxx"
_PORT = 12345

client_socket = socket.socket(socket.AF_INET, socket.SOCK_STREAM)
client_socket.connect((_HOST, _PORT))

def signal_handler(sig, frame):
 client_socket.close()
 time.sleep(1)
 sys.exit()

signal.signal(signal.SIGINT, signal_handler)

def recv_thread(client_socket):
 while True:
 try:
 data = client_socket.recv(1024)
 if data == b'':
 break
 log.debug(data)
 except:
 break

t = threading.Thread(target=recv_thread, args=(client_socket,), daemon=True)
t.start()

while t.isAlive():
 client_socket.send("hello server\n".encode())
 time.sleep(1)
`

## Bluetooth

### server

`python

HOST = socket.BDADDR_ANY # 'ŽłĒŽ£®Ūą¨žä§ žĽ®ŪäłŽ°§Žü¨ Žß• ž£ľžÜĆ'Ž•ľ žßĀž†Ď žěÖŽ†•ŪēīŽŹĄ Žź®
PORT = 1

def signal_handler(sig, frame):
 try:
 connected_socket.close()

 except:
 pass

 server_socket.close()
 sys.exit()

signal.signal(signal.SIGINT, signal_handler)

# ŽłĒŽ£®Ūą¨žä§ žĄúŽ≤Ą žÜĆžľď žÉĚžĄĪ
server_socket = socket.socket(
 socket.AF_BLUETOOTH, socket.SOCK_STREAM, socket.BTPROTO_RFCOMM)
server_socket.bind((HOST, PORT))
server_socket.listen()

# ŪĀīŽĚľžĚīžĖłŪäł ž†ĎžÜć ŽĆÄÍłį
connected_socket, client_address = server_socket.accept()

try:
 while True:
 data = connected_socket.recv(1024)
 print("client :", data)
 connected_socket.send(data)

except:
 pass

connected_socket.close()
server_socket.close()
`

### client

`python

# žĄúŽ≤ĄžĚė HOSTžôÄ PORT ž†ēŽ≥ī
HOST = ''
PORT = 1

def signal_handler(sig, frame):
 client_socket.close()

 sys.exit()

signal.signal(signal.SIGINT, signal_handler)

# ŽłĒŽ£®Ūą¨žä§ ŪĀīŽĚľžĚīžĖłŪäł žÜĆžľď žÉĚžĄĪ
client_socket = socket.socket(
 socket.AF_BLUETOOTH, socket.SOCK_STREAM, socket.BTPROTO_RFCOMM)

# žĄúŽ≤Ą ž†ĎžÜć
client_socket.connect((HOST, PORT))

try:
 while True:
 data = input("client : ")
 if data:
 client_socket.send(data.encode())
 data = client_socket.recv(1024)
 print("server :", data)

except:
 pass

client_socket.close()
``

`python title="atlas_models.py"

from pathlib import Path

from atlas_provider_sqlalchemy.ddl import print_ddl # type: ignore[import-untyped]

models = []

db_dir = Path(db.__file__).parent

for script in db_dir.glob("*.py"):
 if script.suffix == ".py" and script.stem not in ["__init__", "base"]:
 module_name = f"{db.__name__}.{script.stem}"
 module = importlib.import_module(module_name)

 for name, obj in inspect.getmembers(module):
 if inspect.isclass(obj) and obj != db.base.Base and issubclass(obj, db.base.Base):
 models.append(obj)

print_ddl("postgresql", models)
`

## Engine žÉĚžĄĪ

`python
from pydantic import Field
from pydantic_settings import BaseSettings, SettingsConfigDict
from sqlalchemy import Engine
from sqlalchemy import create_engine as _create_engine

class DBConfig(BaseSettings):
 host: str = "localhost"
 port: int = 5432
 user: str = "postgres"
 password: str = Field(exclude=True)
 database: str
 connection_options: str | None = None

 model_config = SettingsConfigDict(env_prefix="db_", env_file=(".env", ".env.local"), extra="ignore")

 def to_url(self) -> str:
 url = f"postgresql+psycopg://{self.user}:{self.password}@{self.host}:{self.port}/{self.database}"
 if self.connection_options:
 url += f"?{self.connection_options}"
 return url

def create_engine(config: DBConfig) -> Engine:
 return _create_engine(config.to_url())
`

`python
from pydantic import Field
from pydantic_settings import BaseSettings, SettingsConfigDict
from sqlalchemy import Engine
from sqlalchemy import create_engine as _create_engine

class DBConfig(BaseSettings):
 host: str = "localhost"
 port: int = 3306
 user: str = "root"
 password: str = Field(exclude=True)
 database: str
 connection_options: str | None = None

 model_config = SettingsConfigDict(env_prefix="db_", env_file=(".env", ".env.local"), extra="ignore")

 def to_url(self) -> str:
 url = f"mysql+pymysql://{self.user}:{self.password}@{self.host}:{self.port}/{self.database}"
 if self.connection_options:
 url += f"?{self.connection_options}"
 return url

def create_engine(config: DBConfig) -> Engine:
 return _create_engine(config.to_url())
`

# from sqlalchemy.orm import Session

engine = create_engine(DBConfig())
# Session == sessionmaker(engine)
SessionLocal = sessionmaker(engine, autocommit=False, autoflush=False)

# sessionžĚĄ žóīÍ≥†, ŽčęžĚĆ
with SessionLocal() as session:
 ...

with SessionLocal() as session:
 # žóźŽü¨ ŽįúžÉĚ žčú rollback, žĄĪÍ≥Ķ žčú commit
 with session.begin()
 ...
``

### Test

`python

class UiMainWindow(tkinter.Frame):
 def __init__(self, master=None):
 super().__init__(master=master)
 self.pack()

 def setup_ui(self):
 # masterŽäĒ UiMainWindow FramežĚĄ ÍīÄŽ¶¨ŪēėŽäĒ žÉĀžúĄ ÍįĚž≤ī
 self.master.title("Main Window")
 # žā¨žĚīž¶ą ž°įž†ē ÍįÄŽä• žó¨Ž∂Ä ŽĄąŽĻĄ, ŽÜížĚī
 self.master.resizable(True, True)
 # ŪôĒŽ©ī ŪĀ¨Íłį
 width = self.winfo_screenwidth()
 height = self.winfo_screenheight()
 # žįĹ ŪĀ¨Íłį
 win_width = 220
 win_height = 100
 # "ŽĄąŽĻĄxŽÜížĚī+xžĘĆŪĎú+yžĘĆŪĎú"
 self.master.geometry(
 "{}x{}+{}+{}".format(
 win_width,
 win_height,
 (width - win_width) // 2,
 (height - win_height) // 2,
 )
 )

 # ŪÖćžä§Ūäł žěÖŽ†•žįĹ ž∂ĒÍįÄ
 self.text_1 = tkinter.Text(self, width=30, height=5)
 # Ž≤ĄŪäľ ž∂ĒÍįÄ
 self.button_1 = tkinter.Button(self, text="Ž™®ŽĎź žā≠ž†ú", width=13)
 self.button_2 = tkinter.Button(self, text="žā≠ž†ú ŪôēžĚł", width=13)

 # widget žúĄžĻė žĄ§ž†ē
 self.text_1.grid(row=0, column=0, columnspan=2)
 self.button_1.grid(row=1, column=0)
 self.button_2.grid(row=1, column=1)

class MainWindow(UiMainWindow):
 def __init__(self, master=None):
 super().__init__(master=master)
 self.background_loop = BackgroundThread()
 self.background_loop.start()

 # UI žĄ§ž†ē
 self.setup_ui()

 # ÍłįŽä• žóįÍ≤į
 self.button_1.bind("", self.push_button_1)
 self.button_2.bind("", self.push_button_2)

 def push_button_1(self, event):
 # ž≤ęŽ≤ąžßł ž§Ą 0Ž≤ą žúĄžĻėŽ∂ÄŪĄį ŽĀĚÍĻĆžßÄ žā≠ž†ú
 self.text_1.delete(1.0, tkinter.END)

 def push_button_2(self, event):
 self.background_loop.add(func=self.delete_message)

 def delete_message(self):
 text = self.text_1.get(1.0, tkinter.END)
 # yes or no Ž©ĒžčúžßÄ Žįēžä§
 answer = tkinter.messagebox.askyesno(
 "Ž©ĒžčúžßÄ žā≠ž†ú", '"{}" Ž•ľ žßÄžöłÍĻĆžöĒ?'.format(text[:-1])
 )
 if answer == True:
 self.text_1.delete(1.0, tkinter.END)

class BackgroundThread(threading.Thread):
 def __init__(self):
 super().__init__()
 self.daemon = True
 self._queue = queue.Queue()

 def run(self):
 while True:
 func, args = self._queue.get()
 func(*args)

 def add(self, func=None, args=()):
 if func is not None:
 self._queue.put((func, args))

if __name__ == "__main__":
 app = tkinter.Tk()
 main_window = MainWindow(app)
 app.mainloop()
``

#### TFlite

### Objective

- [ ] Train and predict using TensorFlow 2 only
- [x] Run yolov4-tiny-relu on Coral board(TPU).
- [ ] Train tiny-relu with coco 2017 dataset
- [ ] Update Docs
- [x] Optimize model and operations

### Performance

### Help

`python
>> from yolov4.tf import YOLOv4
>> help(YOLOv4)
`

### Inference

#### tensorflow

`python

from yolov4.tf import YOLOv4

yolo = YOLOv4()

yolo.config.parse_names("coco.names")
yolo.config.parse_cfg("yolov4-tiny.cfg")

yolo.make_model()
yolo.load_weights("yolov4-tiny.weights", weights_type="yolo")
yolo.summary(summary_type="yolo")
yolo.summary()

yolo.inference(media_path="kite.jpg")

yolo.inference(media_path="road.mp4", is_image=False)

yolo.inference(
 "/dev/video0",
 is_image=False,
 cv_apiPreference=cv2.CAP_V4L2,
 cv_frame_size=(640, 480),
 cv_fourcc="YUYV",
)
`

`python
from yolov4.tf import YOLOv4

yolo = YOLOv4()
# yolo = YOLOv4(tiny=True)

yolo.classes = "coco.names"
yolo.input_size = (640, 480)

yolo.make_model()
yolo.load_weights("yolov4.weights", weights_type="yolo")
# yolo.load_weights("yolov4-tiny.weights", weights_type="yolo")

yolo.inference(media_path="kite.jpg")

yolo.inference(media_path="road.mp4", is_image=False)
`

#### tensorflow lite

`python
from yolov4.tf import YOLOv4, save_as_tflite

yolo = YOLOv4()

yolo.config.parse_names("coco.names")
yolo.config.parse_cfg("yolov4-tiny.cfg")

yolo.make_model()
yolo.load_weights("yolov4-tiny.weights", weights_type="yolo")

save_as_tflite(
 model=yolo.model,
 tflite_path="yolov4-tiny-float16.tflite",
 quantization="float16",
)
`

## Convert coco to custom dataset

### COCO 2017 Dataset

`json
{
 "info": {

 },

 },

 "id": 397133
 },
 ...
 ],

 {
 "segmentation": [[...]],

 "iscrowd": 0,
 "image_id": 289343,
 "bbox": [473.07,395.93,38.65,28.67], // xmin, ymin, width, height
 "category_id": 18,
 "id": 1768
 },
 ...
 ],
 "categories": [
 {
 "supercategory": "person",
 "id": 1,
 "name": "person"
 },
 {
 "supercategory": "vehicle",

 "name": "bicycle"
 },
 ...
 ]
}
`

### Create names file

Create a file with names you want to predict. The class name should be included in categories above.

`text title="custom.names"
person
bicycle
car
motorbike
aeroplane
bus
`

### Conversion script

- 2020-10-16
- OS: Ubuntu 20.04

`python

from collections import OrderedDict
from tqdm import tqdm

INSTANCES_PATH = "instances_train2017.json"
NAMES_PATH = "custom.names"
OUTPUT_FILE_PATH = "custom_train2017.txt"

coco = json.load(open(INSTANCES_PATH))
images = coco["images"]
annotations = coco["annotations"]
categories = coco["categories"]
replaced_name = {
 "couch": "sofa",
 "airplane": "aeroplane",
 "tv": "tvmonitor",
 "motorcycle": "motorbike",
}

class_to_id = {}
id_to_class = {}
with open(NAMES_PATH, "r") as fd:
 index = 0
 for class_name in fd:
 class_name = class_name.strip()
 if len(class_name) != 0:
 id_to_class[index] = class_name
 class_to_id[class_name] = index
 index += 1

dataset = {}

for annotation in tqdm(annotations, desc="Parsing"):
 image_id = annotation["image_id"]
 category_id = annotation["category_id"]

 # Find image
 file_name = None
 image_height = 0
 image_width = 0
 for image in images:
 if image["id"] == image_id:
 file_name = image["file_name"]
 image_height = image["height"]
 image_width = image["width"]
 break

 if file_name is None:
 continue

 # Find class id
 class_id = None
 for category in categories:
 if category["id"] == category_id:
 category_name = category["name"]
 if category_name in replaced_name:
 category_name = replaced_name[category_name]

 class_id = class_to_id.get(category_name)
 break

 if class_id is None:
 continue

 # Calculate x,y,w,h
 x_center = annotation["bbox"][0] + annotation["bbox"][2] / 2
 x_center /= image_width
 y_center = annotation["bbox"][1] + annotation["bbox"][3] / 2
 y_center /= image_height
 width = annotation["bbox"][2] / image_width
 height = annotation["bbox"][3] / image_height

 if dataset.get(image_id):
 dataset[image_id][1].append(
 [class_id, x_center, y_center, width, height]
 )
 else:
 dataset[image_id] = [
 file_name,
 [[class_id, x_center, y_center, width, height]],
 ]

dataset = OrderedDict(sorted(dataset.items()))

with open(OUTPUT_FILE_PATH, "w") as fd:
 for image_id, bboxes in tqdm(dataset.items(), desc="Saving"):
 data = bboxes[0]
 for bbox in bboxes[1]:
 data += " "
 data += "{:d},".format(bbox[0])
 data += "{:8.6f},".format(bbox[1])
 data += "{:8.6f},".format(bbox[2])
 data += "{:8.6f},".format(bbox[3])
 data += "{:8.6f}".format(bbox[4])

 data += "\n"
 fd.write(data)
`

### Dataset test script

- 2021-02-21
- OS: Ubuntu 20.04
- yolov4: v3.1.0

`python

from yolov4.tf import YOLOv4, YOLODataset

yolo = YOLOv4()
yolo.config.parse_names("test/coco.names")
yolo.config.parse_cfg("config/yolov4-tiny.cfg")

dataset = YOLODataset(
 config=yolo.config,
 dataset_list="/home/hhk7734/NN/val2017.txt",
 image_path_prefix="/home/hhk7734/NN/val2017",
)

count = 0
for i, (images, gt) in enumerate(dataset):
 cv2.namedWindow("truth", cv2.WINDOW_AUTOSIZE)

 beta_nms = yolo.config.metayolos[0].beta_nms
 classes = yolo.config.metayolos[0].classes
 stride = classes + 5
 num_mask = len(yolo.config.masks[0])

 candidates = []
 for y, metayolo in enumerate(yolo.config.metayolos):
 candidates.append(gt[y][..., : -len(yolo.config.yolo_0.mask)])

 for batch in range(len(images)):
 frame = images[batch, ...] * 255
 frame = cv2.cvtColor(frame.astype(np.uint8), cv2.COLOR_RGB2BGR)
 height, width, _ = frame.shape

 yolos = []
 for c, cand in enumerate(candidates):
 truth = cand[batch : batch + 1, ...]
 _, h, w, ch = truth.shape
 mask = yolo.config.masks[c]
 for n in range(num_mask):
 xy_index = n * stride
 wh_index = xy_index + 2
 oc_index = xy_index + 4

 xy = truth[..., xy_index:wh_index] * np.array([w, h])
 truth[..., xy_index:wh_index] = xy - xy.astype(np.int)

 awh = yolo.config.anchors[mask[n]]
 wh = truth[..., wh_index:oc_index] / awh
 truth[..., wh_index:oc_index] = np.log(
 wh + np.finfo(np.float32).eps
 )

 treu_bboxes = yolo.get_yolo_detections(
 [c[batch : batch + 1, ...] for c in candidates]
 )
 # yolo.fit_to_original(treu_bboxes, height, width)
 image2 = yolo.draw_bboxes(frame, treu_bboxes)
 cv2.imshow("truth", image2)
 while cv2.waitKey(10) & 0xFF != ord("q"):
 pass
 count += 1
 if count == 30:
 break
 if count == 30:
 break
`

- 2020-10-27
- OS: Ubuntu 20.04
- yolov4: v2.0.0

`python

from yolov4.tf import YOLOv4

yolo = YOLOv4()
yolo.classes = "coco.names"
yolo.input_size = (640, 480)
yolo.batch_size = 2
dataset = yolo.load_dataset("train2017.txt", image_path_prefix="train2017")

for i, (images, gt) in enumerate(dataset):
 for j in range(len(images)):
 _candidates = []
 for candidate in gt:
 grid_size = candidate.shape[1:3]
 _candidates.append(
 tf.reshape(
 candidate[j], shape=(1, grid_size[0] * grid_size[1] * 3, -1)
 )
 )
 candidates = np.concatenate(_candidates, axis=1)

 frame = images[j, ...] * 255
 frame = frame.astype(np.uint8)

 pred_bboxes = yolo.candidates_to_pred_bboxes(candidates[0])
 pred_bboxes = yolo.fit_pred_bboxes_to_original(pred_bboxes, frame.shape)
 frame = cv2.cvtColor(frame, cv2.COLOR_RGB2BGR)
 image = yolo.draw_bboxes(frame, pred_bboxes)
 cv2.namedWindow("result", cv2.WINDOW_AUTOSIZE)
 cv2.imshow("result", image)
 while cv2.waitKey(10) & 0xFF != ord("q"):
 pass
 if i == 10:
 break

cv2.destroyWindow("result")
``

title: YOLOv4 on Edge TPU
headings: Install just the TensorFlow Lite interpreter
text:
## Prepare int8 tflite

Supported Operation: https://coral.ai/docs/edgetpu/models-intro/#supported-operations

- **Use YOLOv4-Tiny** because YOLOv4 model size is too large.
- **Use relu** for activation. YOLOv4-Tiny uses leaky-relu, but this is an **unsupported operation** on the Edge TPU.
- Set the desired input_size before converting the model to tflite.

### Training

Ref: https://wiki.loliot.net/docs/operation/language/library/python-yolov4/yolov4-training#full-script

Use yolov4-tiny-relu.cfg

``python {5,10}
from tensorflow.keras import callbacks, optimizers
from yolov4.tf import SaveWeightsCallback, YOLOv4

yolo = YOLOv4(tiny=True)
yolo.classes = "/content/drive/My Drive/Hard_Soft/NN/coco/coco.names"
yolo.input_size = 608
yolo.batch_size = 32

yolo.make_model(activation1="relu")

...
`

### Convert to tflite

- 2021-02-21
- OS: Ubuntu 20.04
- TF: v2.4.1
- yolov4: v3.1.0

Use yolov4-tiny-relu-tpu.cfg

Don't confuse yolov4-iny-relu.cfg and yolov4-tiny-relu-tpu.cfg

`python
from yolov4.tf import YOLOv4, YOLODataset, save_as_tflite

yolo = YOLOv4()

yolo.config.parse_names("test/coco.names")
yolo.config.parse_cfg("config/yolov4-tiny-relu-tpu.cfg")

yolo.make_model()
yolo.load_weights(
 "/home/hhk7734/NN/yolov4-tiny-relu.weights", weights_type="yolo"
)

dataset = YOLODataset(
 config=yolo.config,
 dataset_list="/home/hhk7734/NN/val2017.txt",
 image_path_prefix="/home/hhk7734/NN/val2017",
 training=False,
)

save_as_tflite(
 model=yolo.model,
 tflite_path="yolov4-tiny-relu-int8.tflite",
 quantization="full_int8",
 dataset=dataset,
)
`

## Run on Edge TPU

### Install the Edge TPU runtime

Ref: https://coral.ai/docs/accelerator/get-started/#1-install-the-edge-tpu-runtime

### Install just the TensorFlow Lite interpreter

Ref: https://www.tensorflow.org/lite/guide/python#install_just_the_tensorflow_lite_interpreter

### Run example script

`python title="edge_yolov4_tiny_video_test.py"

from yolov4.tflite import YOLOv4

yolo = YOLOv4()

yolo.config.parse_names("coco.names")
yolo.config.parse_cfg("yolov4-tiny-relu-tpu.cfg")

yolo.summary()

yolo.load_tflite("yolov4-tiny-relu-int8_edgetpu.tflite")

yolo.inference(
 "/dev/video1",
 is_image=False,
 cv_apiPreference=cv2.CAP_V4L2,
 cv_frame_size=(640, 480),
 cv_fourcc="YUYV",
)
`

`python title="edge_yolov4_tiny_video_test.py"
from yolov4.tflite import YOLOv4

yolo = YOLOv4(tiny=True, tpu=True)

yolo.classes = "coco.names"

yolo.load_tflite("yolov4-tiny-relu-int8_edgetpu.tflite")

yolo.inference(
 "/dev/video1",
 is_image=False,
 cv_apiPreference=cv2.CAP_V4L2,
 cv_frame_size=(640, 480),
 cv_fourcc="YUYV",
)
`

text:
## Save dataset for mAP

### Downloads

- mAP: https://github.com/Cartucho/mAP
- val2017 images: https://cocodataset.org/#download
- coco.names, val2017.txt: https://github.com/hhk7734/tensorflow-yolov4/tree/master/test/dataset

### Script

- 2021-02-21
- OS: Ubuntu 20.04
- TF: v2.4.1
- yolov4: v3.1.0

``python
from yolov4.tf import YOLOv4, YOLODataset, create_mAP_input_files

yolo = YOLOv4()
yolo.config.parse_names("coco.names")
yolo.config.parse_cfg("yolov4-tiny.cfg")

yolo.make_model()
yolo.load_weights("/home/hhk7734/NN/yolov4-tiny.weights", weights_type="yolo")

dataset = YOLODataset(
 config=yolo.config,
 dataset_list="/home/hhk7734/NN/val2017.txt",
 image_path_prefix="/home/hhk7734/NN/val2017",
 training=False,
)

create_mAP_input_files(yolo, mAP_path="/home/hhk7734/mAP", dataset=dataset)
`

- 2020-10-15
- OS: Ubuntu 20.04
- TF: v2.3.1
- yolov4: v1.2.1

`python
from yolov4.tf import YOLOv4

yolo = YOLOv4(tiny=True)

yolo.classes = "coco.names"

yolo.make_model()
yolo.load_weights("yolov4-tiny.weights", weights_type="yolo")

dataset = yolo.load_dataset(
 "val2017.txt",
 training=False,
 image_path_prefix="/home/hhk7734/val2017",
)

yolo.save_dataset_for_mAP("/home/hhk7734/mAP", dataset)
`

- @param mAP_path

## ResNet

**Res**: Residual

### ResBlock

[convolutional]
batch_normalize=1
filters=32
size=1
stride=1
pad=1
activation=mish

batch_normalize=1
filters=64
size=3
stride=1
pad=1
activation=mish

[shortcut]
from=-3
activation=linear
`

### ResNet

## CSPResNet

**CSP**: Cross Stage Partial

`ini
[convolutional]
batch_normalize=1
filters=64
size=1
stride=1
pad=1
activation=mish

[route]
layers = -2

[convolutional]
batch_normalize=1
filters=64
size=1
stride=1
pad=1
activation=mish

... resnet -> 3 x n layers ...

[convolutional]
batch_normalize=1
filters=64
size=1
stride=1
pad=1
activation=mish

[route]
layers = -1,-7 # -(3 x n + 4)

[convolutional]
batch_normalize=1
filters=64
size=1
stride=1
pad=1
activation=mish
`

pad=1
activation=mish

... CSPResNet -> ResBlock x 8 ...

# Downsample

[convolutional]

filters=1024
size=3
stride=2
pad=1
activation=mish

... CSPResNet -> ResBlock x 4 ...

‚Ēú‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ train2017
‚Ēā ‚Ēú‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ 000000000009.jpg
‚Ēā ‚Ēú‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ 000000000025.jpg
‚Ēā ‚Ēú‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ 000000000030.jpg
‚Ēā ‚ĒĒ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ ...
‚ĒĒ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ ...
`

`python
# Call YOLODataset after yolo.config.parse_cfg():
train_dataset = YOLODataset(
 config=yolo.config,
 dataset_list="/content/drive/My Drive/Hard_Soft/NN/coco/train2017.txt",
 image_path_prefix="/content/train2017",
 training=True,
)
`

`python
# Call load_dataset() after yolo.: anchors, classes, input_size, xyscales, ...
train_data_set = yolo.load_dataset(
 "/content/drive/My Drive/Hard_Soft/NN/coco/train2017.txt",
 image_path_prefix="/content/train2017",
 label_smoothing=0.05
)
`

### Set yolo parameters

Use .cfg(darknet).

`python
yolo = YOLOv4()

yolo.config.parse_names("coco.names")
yolo.config.parse_cfg("yolov4-tiny.cfg")
`

`python
yolo = YOLOv4(tiny=True)
yolo.classes = "/content/drive/My Drive/Hard_Soft/NN/coco/coco.names"
yolo.input_size = 608 # == width, height
yolo.batch_size = 32

# Call make_model() after yolo.: anchors, classes, input_size, xyscales, ...
yolo.make_model()
`

### Load pre-trained weights

`python
yolo.load_weights(
 "/content/drive/My Drive/Hard_Soft/NN/yolov4/yolov4-tiny.conv.29",
 weights_type="yolo"
)
`

### Freeze some layers

`python
# Tested on v3 only
for i in range(29):
 yolo.model.get_layer(index=i).trainable = False
`

### Set callbacks and Compile

Use .cfg(darknet).

`python
yolo.compile()

_callbacks = [
 callbacks.TerminateOnNaN(),
 callbacks.TensorBoard(
 log_dir="/content/drive/MyDrive/Hard_Soft/NN/logs",
 update_freq=200,
 histogram_freq=1,
 ),
 SaveWeightsCallback(
 yolo=yolo,
 dir_path="/content/drive/MyDrive/Hard_Soft/NN/trained",
 weights_type="yolo",
 step_per_save=2000,
 ),
]
`

`python
epochs = 400
lr = 1e-4

optimizer = optimizers.Adam(learning_rate=lr)
yolo.compile(optimizer=optimizer, loss_iou_type="ciou")

def lr_scheduler(epoch):
 if epoch

title: Linting & Formatting
text:
## ruff

``shell
poetry add --group dev ruff
`

`shell
python3 -m pip install ruff
`

- https://docs.astral.sh/ruff/configuration/

`toml title="pyproject.toml"
[tool.ruff]
exclude = [
 ".bzr",
 ".direnv",
 ".eggs",
 ".git",
 ".git-rewrite",
 ".hg",
 ".ipynb_checkpoints",
 ".mypy_cache",
 ".nox",
 ".pants.d",
 ".pyenv",
 ".pytest_cache",
 ".pytype",
 ".ruff_cache",
 ".svn",
 ".tox",
 ".venv",
 ".vscode",
 "__pypackages__",
 "_build",
 "buck-out",
 "build",
 "dist",
 "node_modules",
 "site-packages",
 "venv",
]

line-length = 120
indent-width = 4

[tool.ruff.lint]
select = ["E4", "E7", "E9", "F", "I"]
ignore = []

fixable = ["ALL"]
unfixable = []

dummy-variable-rgx = "^(_+|(_+[a-zA-Z0-9_]*[a-zA-Z0-9]+?))$"

[tool.ruff.format]
quote-style = "double"
indent-style = "space"
skip-magic-trailing-comma = false
line-ending = "auto"
`

`shell
ruff check --fix **/*.py
`

`shell
ruff format **/*.py
`

]

# Configuration file for the Sphinx documentation builder.

copyright = "2021, "
author =

release = "0.0.1"

]

napoleon_use_param = False

napoleon_type_aliases = None
napoleon_attr_annotations = True

]

# https://github.com/mgaitan/sphinxcontrib-mermaid

]

}

# -- Options for HTML output -------------------------------------------------

html_theme = "sphinx_rtd_theme"

html_static_path = []

title: React Query useMutation
text:
## useMutation

useMutationžĚÄ Create/Update/Delete ž≤ėŽüľ žĄúŽ≤Ą žÉĀŪÉúŽ•ľ Ž≥ÄÍ≤ĹŪēėŽäĒ žěĎžóÖžĚĄ žąėŪĖČŪēėŽäĒŽćį žā¨žö©Žź©ŽčąŽč§.

- https://react-query-v3.tanstack.com/reference/useMutation

``ts

const mutation = useMutation({
 mutationFn, // (variables: TVariables) => Promise
 cacheTime,
 mutationKey,
 networkMode,
 onError, // (err: TError, variables: TVariables, context?: TContext) => Promise | unknown
 onMutate, // (variables: TVariables) => Promise | TContext | void
 onSettled, // (data: TData, error: TError, variables: TVariables, context?: TContext) => Promise | unknown
 onSuccess, // (data: TData, variables: TVariables, context?: TContext) => Promise | unknown
 retry,
 retryDelay,
 useErrorBoundary,
 meta,
});

const {
 data,
 error,
 isError,
 isIdle,
 isLoading,
 isPaused,
 isSuccess,
 failureCount,
 failureReason,
 mutate,
 mutateAsync,
 reset,
 status,
} = mutation;

mutation.mutate(variables, {
 localOnError, // (err: TError, variables: TVariables, context: TContext | undefined) => void
 localOnSettled, // (data: TData | undefined, error: TError | null, variables: TVariables, context: TContext | undefined) => void
 localOnSuccess, // (data: TData, variables: TVariables, context: TContext) => void
});
`

- mutation.mutateŽ•ľ Ūėłž∂úŪēėŽ©ī onMutate -\> mutationFn -> ((onSuccess -\> localOnSuccess) || (onError -\> localOnError)) -> onSettled -\> localOnSettled` žąúžúľŽ°ú žč§ŪĖČŽź©ŽčąŽč§.

title: React Query useQuery
text:
## useQuery

- https://tanstack.com/query/latest/docs/react/reference/useQuery

``ts

const query = useQuery({
 queryKey, // unknown[]
 queryFn, // (context: QueryFunctionContext) => Promise
 cacheTime,
 enabled,
 networkMode,
 initialData,
 initialDataUpdatedAt,
 keepPreviousData,
 meta,
 notifyOnChangeProps,
 onError,
 onSettled,
 onSuccess,
 placeholderData,
 queryKeyHashFn,
 refetchInterval,
 refetchIntervalInBackground,
 refetchOnMount,
 refetchOnReconnect,
 refetchOnWindowFocus,
 retry,
 retryOnMount,
 retryDelay,
 select,
 staleTime,
 structuralSharing,
 suspense,
 useErrorBoundary,
});

const {
 data,
 dataUpdatedAt,
 error,
 errorUpdateCount,
 errorUpdatedAt,
 failureCount,
 failureReason,
 fetchStatus,
 isError, // status === "error"
 isFetched,
 isFetchedAfterMount,
 isFetching,
 isInitialLoading,
 isLoading, // status === "loading"
 isLoadingError,
 isPaused,
 isPlaceholderData,
 isPreviousData,
 isRefetchError,
 isRefetching,
 isStale,
 isSuccess, // status === "success"
 refetch,
 remove,
 status,
} = query;
`

## Query Key

- https://tanstack.com/query/latest/docs/react/guides/query-keys

žŅľŽ¶¨ŽäĒ queryKeyŽ•ľ ÍłįŽįėžúľŽ°ú žļźžčĪžĚĄ ÍīÄŽ¶¨Ūē©ŽčąŽč§. ŽĒįŽĚľžĄú ÍįôžĚÄ queryFnžĚĄ ÍįÄž°ĆŽćĒŽĚľŽŹĄ queryKeyÍįÄ Žč§Ž•īŽ©ī Žč§Ž•ł žŅľŽ¶¨Ž°ú ž∑®ÍłČŽź©ŽčąŽč§.

queryKeyžĚė Í≥†žú†žĄĪžĚÄ Žįįžóī ŽāīžĚė žēĄžĚīŪÖúžóź žĚėŪēī Í≤įž†ēŽźėŽ©į, žēĄžĚīŪÖúžĚÄ ÍįôŽćĒŽĚľŽŹĄ žąúžĄúÍįÄ Žč§Ž•īŽ©ī Žč§Ž•ł Í≤ÉžúľŽ°ú ÍįĄž£ľŪē©ŽčąŽč§. Žč®, žēĄžĚīŪÖúžĚī ÍįĚž≤īžĚł Í≤Ĺžöį ÍįĚž≤ī ŽāīžĚė Ūā§ žąúžĄúŽäĒ Í≥†Ž†§ŽźėžßÄ žēäžäĶŽčąŽč§.

ŽĒįŽĚľžĄú žēĄŽěėžôÄ ÍįôžĚÄ Í≤Ĺžöį Ž™®ŽĎź ÍįôžĚÄ queryKeyŽ°ú ž∑®ÍłČŽźėŽ©į

`ts
useQuery({ queryKey: ['todos', { status, page }], ... })
useQuery({ queryKey: ['todos', { page, status }], ...})
useQuery({ queryKey: ['todos', { page, status, other: undefined }], ... })
`

žēĄŽěėžôÄ ÍįôžĚÄ Í≤ĹžöįŽäĒ Ž™®ŽĎź Žč§Ž•ł queryKeyŽ°ú ž∑®ÍłČŽź©ŽčąŽč§.

`ts
useQuery({ queryKey: ['todos', status, page], ... })
useQuery({ queryKey: ['todos', page, status], ...})
useQuery({ queryKey: ['todos', undefined, page, status], ...})
`

## Query Function

`ts
useQuery({
 queryFn: async (context) => {
 const {
 queryKey, // unknown[]

 signal, // undefined | AbortSignal
 meta, //undefined | Record
 } = context;

 const res = await fetch(...);

 // throw Error("error"); -> onError

 // return data; -> onSuccess
 },
});
``

title: Arduino How to use library
text:
The Arduino ecosystem is so large that there are many libraries for sensors. The Arduino library makes it easy to test your sensor on Arduino board. I will explain how to use the library on Arduino.

## Download library

Find and download a required library below.

- https://www.google.com
- https://www.arduinolibraries.info/
- https://github.com/adafruit?utf8=%E2%9C%93&q=arduino

By default, the Arduino IDE searches for libraries in ~/Arduino/libraries at startup. So, move or copy the downloaded library to ~/Arduino/libraries and restart the IDE.

In general, the directory tree looks like this:

``shell
Arduino
‚ĒĒ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ libraries
 ‚Ēú‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ A/
 ‚Ēā ‚Ēú‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ examples/
 ‚Ēā ‚Ēú‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ keywords.txt
 ‚Ēā ‚Ēú‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ library.properties
 ‚Ēā ‚ĒĒ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ src/
 ‚Ēā ‚Ēú‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ A.cpp
 ‚Ēā ‚ĒĒ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ A.h
 ‚Ēú‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ B/
 ‚Ēā ‚Ēú‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ B.cpp
 ‚Ēā ‚Ēú‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ B.h
 ‚Ēā ‚ĒĒ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ ...
 ‚ĒĒ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ ...
`

## Include library

If you know the library header, include header using #include. If not, find the library in **Sketch -\> Include Library** menu.

`cpp
#include

void setup() {
 // ...
}
void loop() {
 // ...
}
``

## Find docs or See¬†example

If you are new to the library, read the docs about it. Another good way to understand the usage is to look at examples. In general, Arduino libraries have own examples. Find the example in **File -\> Examples** menu.

## Wire sensor and¬†board

Different sensors use differently, so you should search for this or read the datasheet. Believe God **Google**...

## Example

https://medium.com/@hhk7734/how-to-use-i2c-lcd-on-odroid-eaf20d20966c

title: Arduino Library specification
text:
Ref: https://arduino.github.io/arduino-cli/library-specification/

## Layout of folders and files

``shell
Arduino
‚ĒĒ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ libraries
 ‚ĒĒ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ my_lib/
 ‚Ēú‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ examples/
 ‚Ēú‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ keywords.txt
 ‚Ēú‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ library.properties
 ‚ĒĒ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ src/
 ‚Ēú‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ my_lib.cpp
 ‚ĒĒ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ my_lib.h
`

## Library metadata

### library.properties

`ini title="library.properties"
name=
version=
author=
maintainer=
sentence=
paragraph=
category=[Display|Communication|Signal Input/Output|Sensors|Device Control|Timing|Data Storage|Data Processing|Other]
url=
architectures=*
# optional
dot_a_linkage=
includes=
precompiled=
ldflags=
`

## Keywords(Syntax highlight)

keywords.txt is formatted in four fields which are separated by **a single true tab** (not spaces)

### keywords.txt

`makefile title="keywords.txt"
######################################
# Syntax Coloring Map For Wire
######################################

######################################
# Datatypes (KEYWORD1)
######################################

######################################
# Methods and Functions (KEYWORD2)
######################################

######################################
# Instances (KEYWORD2)
######################################

######################################
# Constants (LITERAL1)
######################################

``
snippet:
Ref: https://arduino.github.io/arduino-cli/library-specification/

``shell
Arduino
‚ĒĒ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ libraries
 ‚ĒĒ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ my_lib/
 ‚Ēú‚Ä¶

## platform.txt

`ini title="platform.txt"
# IDE -> Tools -> Board žóź ŪĎúžčúŽźėŽäĒ žĻīŪÖĆÍ≥†Ž¶¨
name=

###################
# compile variables

# override

build.extra_flags=
compiler.cross_compile=
compiler.S.extra_flags=
compiler.c.extra_flags=
compiler.cpp.extra_flags=
compiler.ar.extra_flags=
compiler.combine.extra_flags=

##################
# compile patterns
##################

# ŽĚľžĚīŽłĆŽü¨Ž¶¨ ÍįźžßÄ, Ūē®žąė ŪĒĄŽ°úŪÜ† ŪÉÄžěÖ žÉĚžĄĪ
recipe.preproc.macros="{compiler.path}{compiler.cross_compile}{compiler.cpp.cmd}" {compiler.cpp.flags} {preproc.macros.flags} -DARDUINO={runtime.ide.version} -DARDUINO_{build.board} -DARDUINO_ARCH_{build.arch} {compiler.cpp.extra_flags} {build.extra_flags} {includes} "{source_file}" -o "{preprocessed_file_path}"
preproc.macros.flags= -w -x c++ -E -CC

# NUMBERŽäĒ 1 ~ 9 ŽėźŽäĒ 01 ~ 99 žąúžĄúŽĆÄŽ°ú žč§ŪĖČ Žź®
# recipe.hooks.sketch.prebuild.NUMBER.pattern=
# recipe.hooks.sketch.postbuild.NUMBER.pattern=
# recipe.hooks.libraries.prebuild.NUMBER.pattern=
# recipe.hooks.libraries.postbuild.NUMBER.pattern=
# recipe.hooks.core.prebuild.NUMBER.pattern=
# recipe.hooks.core.postbuild.NUMBER.pattern=
# recipe.hooks.linking.prelink.NUMBER.pattern=
# recipe.hooks.linking.postlink.NUMBER.pattern=
# recipe.hooks.objcopy.preobjcopy.NUMBER.pattern=
# recipe.hooks.objcopy.postobjcopy.NUMBER.pattern=
# recipe.hooks.savehex.presavehex.NUMBER.pattern=
# recipe.hooks.savehex.postsavehex.NUMBER.pattern=

# Compile S files
recipe.S.o.pattern="{compiler.path}{compiler.cross_compile}{compiler.S.cmd}" {compiler.S.flags} -DARDUINO={runtime.ide.version} -DARDUINO_{build.board} -DARDUINO_ARCH_{build.arch} {compiler.S.extra_flags} {build.extra_flags} {includes} "{source_file}" -o "{object_file}"

# Compile c files
recipe.c.o.pattern="{compiler.path}{compiler.cross_compile}{compiler.c.cmd}" {compiler.c.flags} -DARDUINO={runtime.ide.version} -DARDUINO_{build.board} -DARDUINO_ARCH_{build.arch} {compiler.c.extra_flags} {build.extra_flags} {includes} "{source_file}" -o "{object_file}"

# Compile c++ files
recipe.cpp.o.pattern="{compiler.path}{compiler.cross_compile}{compiler.cpp.cmd}" {compiler.cpp.flags} -DARDUINO={runtime.ide.version} -DARDUINO_{build.board} -DARDUINO_ARCH_{build.arch} {compiler.cpp.extra_flags} {build.extra_flags} {includes} "{source_file}" -o "{object_file}"

# Archives
recipe.ar.pattern="{compiler.path}{compiler.cross_compile}{compiler.ar.cmd}" {compiler.ar.flags} {compiler.ar.extra_flags} "{archive_file_path}" "{object_file}"

# Combine gc-sections, archives, and objects
recipe.c.combine.pattern="{compiler.path}{compiler.cross_compile}{compiler.combine.cmd}" {compiler.combine.flags} {compiler.combine.extra_flags} -o "{build.path}/{build.project_name}.out" {object_files} {archive_file_path} "-L{build.path}"

# IDE-> Sketch -> Export compiled Binary
recipe.output.tmp_file={build.project_name}.out
recipe.output.save_file={build.project_name}.{build.variant}.out

#######
# tools
#######
tools.tool_1.path=
tools.tool_1.cmd=

tools.tool_1.program.params.quiet=
tools.tool_1.program.pattern=

tools.tool_1.upload.pattern=
tools.tool_1.erase.pattern=
tools.tool_1.bootloader.pattern=
`

text:
## Installtion

žĽīŪĆĆžĚľÍ≥ľ ŽßĀŪĀ¨Ž•ľ žßĄŪĖČŪēėÍłį ž†Ąžóź **avr-gcc**, **binutils-avr**, **avr-libc**Ž•ľ žĄ§žĻėŪēīžēľ Ūē©ŽčąŽč§.

- binutils-avr: assembler, linker ŽďĪ ŽįĒžĚīŽĄąŽ¶¨ ŪĆĆžĚľžĚĄ Žč§Ž£®ŽäĒ Žćį ŪēĄžöĒŪēú ŽŹĄÍĶ¨ Ž™®žõÄ
- avr-gcc: C/C++ ŪĆĆžĚľžĚĄ AVRžóźžĄú žč§ŪĖČŪē† žąė žěąŽäĒ žĹĒŽďúŽ°ú ŽįĒÍŅĒž£ľŽäĒ ŪĀ¨Ž°úžä§ žĽīŪĆĆžĚľŽü¨
- avr-libc: AVR ŽĚľžĚīŽłĆŽü¨Ž¶¨ žÜĆžä§

Download: https://www.microchip.com/mplab/avr-support

### macOS

``shell
brew tap osx-cross/avr \
&& brew install avr-gcc
`

### Linux(debian)

`shell
sudo apt-get install -y binutils-avr gcc-avr avr-libc
`

### Windows

AVR 8-bit Toolchain for WindowsŽ•ľ Žč§žöī ŽįõžäĶŽčąŽč§.

**C:\Program Files (x86)** ŽėźŽäĒ žõźŪēėŽäĒ žúĄžĻėžóź žēēž∂ēžĚĄ ŪíÄžĖīž§ćŽčąŽč§.

ŪôėÍ≤Ĺ Ž≥ÄžąėžĚė Pathžóź **žĄ§žĻėŽźú ŽĒĒŽ†ČŪĄįŽ¶¨/bin**žĚĄ ž∂ĒÍįÄŪē©ŽčąŽč§.

- bin: binutils, gcc, gdb ŽďĪ
- avr/lib: avr-libc, startup files, linker scripts ŽďĪ
- avr/include: avr-libc Ūó§ŽćĒ, avr/io.h ŽďĪ
- doc: Ž¨łžĄú

Atmel studiožĚĄ žĄ§žĻėŪĖąŽč§Ž©ī Atmel studioÍįÄ žā¨žö©ŪēėŽäĒ toolchainžĚĄ Pathžóź ŽďĪŽ°ĚŪēėŽ©ī Žź©ŽčąŽč§.

žėąŽ•ľ Žď§žĖī **C:\Program Files (x86)\Atmel\Studio\7.0\toolchain\avr8\avr8-gnu-toolchain\bin**žĚĄ ž∂ĒÍįÄŪēėŽ©ī Žź©ŽčąŽč§.

## Compile

**žÜĆžä§ ŪĆĆžĚľ**(.c)žĚĄ **Ž™©ž†Ā ŪĆĆžĚľ**(.o)Ž°ú žĽīŪĆĆžĚľŪēėŽäĒ Ž™ÖŽ†ĻžĖīŽäĒ žēĄŽěėžôÄ ÍįôžäĶŽčąŽč§.

`shell
avr-gcc -c -Os -Wall -mmcu= -DF_CPU= -o
`

- -mmcu=: žā¨žö©Ūē† MCU žĄ§ž†ē.
 - https://gcc.gnu.org/onlinedocs/gcc/AVR-Options.html

## Link

žĽīŪĆĆžĚľžĚĄ ŪÜĶŪēī ŽßĆŽď† **Ž™©ž†Ā ŪĆĆžĚľ**(.o)Í≥ľ žā¨žö©Žźú ŽĚľžĚīŽłĆŽü¨Ž¶¨Ž•ľ ŽßĀŪĀ¨ŪēīžĄú **žč§ŪĖČ ŪĆĆžĚľ**(.elf)žĚĄ ŽßĆŽď§Í≥†, ŽßĀŪĀ¨ ž†ēŽ≥īŽ•ľ ÍįÄžßÄÍ≥† žěąŽäĒ **ŽßĶ ŪĆĆžĚľ**(.map)žĚĄ ŽßĆŽďúŽäĒ Ž™ÖŽ†ĻžĖīŽäĒ žēĄŽěėžôÄ ÍįôžäĶŽčąŽč§.

``

snippet: EEPROMžĚÄ ž†ĄÍłįž†Ā žč†ŪėłŽ•ľ ŪÜĶŪēī ŽćįžĚīŪĄįŽ•ľ žßÄžöįÍ≥† ž†Äžě•Ūē† žąė žěąŽäĒ Ž©ĒŽ™®Ž¶¨žěÖŽčąŽč§. ATmega328pžĚė Í≤Ĺžöį 1 KB žā¨žĚīž¶ąžĚė EEPROMžĚĄ Žāīžě•ŪēėÍ≥† žěąžäĶŽčą‚Ä¶

title: AVR I2C
text:
I2C ŪÜĶžč†žĚÄ ŽĎź ÍįúžĚė žĄ†žúľŽ°ú žó¨Žü¨ žě•žĻėžóź ž†ĎÍ∑ľŪēėžó¨ ŽćįžĚīŪĄįŽ•ľ ž£ľÍ≥† ŽįõžĚĄ žąė žěąžäĶŽčąŽč§. ŽĎź ÍįúžĚė žĄ†žĚÄ clockžĚĄ ŽŹôÍłįŪôĒŪēėÍłį žúĄŪēú **SCL**Í≥ľ clockžóź Žßěž∂į ŽćįžĚīŪĄįŽ•ľ Ž≥īŽāīÍłį žúĄŪēú **SDA**žúľŽ°ú ÍĶ¨žĄĪŽźėžĖī žěąžäĶŽčąŽč§. ŪÜĶžč†žĚĄ ž£ľŽŹĄŪēėŽäĒ masterÍįÄ žěąÍ≥†, masteržĚė Ž™ÖŽ†Ļžóź ŽĒįŽĚľ ŽćįžĚīŪĄįŽ•ľ žÜ°žąėžč†ŪēėŽäĒ slaveÍįÄ žěąžäĶŽčąŽč§.

masterÍįÄ žčúžěĎ žč†ŪėłžôÄ Ūē®ÍĽė slavežĚė ž£ľžÜĆŽ•ľ Ž≥īŽāīŽ©ī ž£ľžÜĆžóź ŽßěŽäĒ slaveŽßĆ žěĎŽŹôŪēėÍłį ŽēĆŽ¨łžóź žó¨Žü¨ žě•žĻėÍįÄ žóįÍ≤įŽź† žąė žěąžßÄŽßĆ ž£ľžÜĆÍįÄ ŽŹôžĚľŪēú Í≤Ĺžöį Ž¨łž†úÍįÄ ŽįúžÉĚŪē©ŽčąŽč§.

SDA, SCL žĄ†žĚÄ žēĄŽěė Í∑łŽ¶ľž≤ėŽüľ Pull-upž†ÄŪē≠žĚĄ žóįÍ≤įŪēīžēľ Ūē©ŽčąŽč§.

ž£ľžÜĆ ŽćįžĚīŪĄįŽäĒ slave ž£ľžÜĆ 7 ŽĻĄŪäłžôÄ read/write 1 ŽĻĄŪäłŽ°ú ÍĶ¨žĄĪŽźėžĖī žěąžäĶŽčąŽč§.(10 ŽĻĄŪäł ž£ľžÜĆŽ•ľ ÍįĖŽäĒ Í≤ĹžöįŽŹĄ žěąžäĶŽčąŽč§.) R/W ŽĻĄŪäłÍįÄ 1 žĚīŽ©ī slave -> master, 0 žĚīŽ©ī master -> slave Žį©ŪĖ•žúľŽ°ú ŽćįžĚīŪĄįÍįÄ ž†ĄžÜ°Žź©ŽčąŽč§.

## Abbreviation

- **S**: Start condition
- **Rs**: Repeated start condition
- **R**: Read bit (High level at SDA)
- **W**: Wriet bit (Low level at SDA)
- **ACK**: ACKnowledge bit (Low level at SDA)
- **NACK**: Not ACKnowledge bit (High levle at SDA)
- **Data**: 8-bit data byte
- **P**: stoP condition
- **SLA**: SLave Adress

## Master Ž™®Žďú

### master -> slave

ŪÜĶžč† žąúžĄúŽäĒ **S -> SLA + W -> Data -> ... -> P** žěÖŽčąŽč§. ...žĚÄ žó¨Žü¨ ÍįúžĚė ŽćįžĚīŪĄįŽ•ľ žĚėŽĮłŪē©ŽčąŽč§.

slavežóź žěąŽäĒ Ž†ąžßÄžä§ŪĄįžóź ÍįížĚĄ žďįÍ≥† žč∂žĚÄ Í≤Ĺžöį, Ž†ąžßÄžä§ŪĄį ž£ľžÜĆŽ•ľ SLRAŽĚľÍ≥† ŪēúŽč§Ž©ī
ŪÜĶžč† žąúžĄúŽäĒ **S -> SLA + W -> SLRA -> Data -> P** žěÖŽčąŽč§.
slavežĚė Ž†ąžßÄžä§ŪĄį ž£ľžÜĆŽ•ľ Ž≥īŽāľ ŽēĆŽäĒ ž£ľžÜĆŽ•ľ ŪēėŽāėžĚė DataŽĚľÍ≥† žÉĚÍįĀŪēėÍ≥† žēĄŽěėžóźžĄú DataŽ•ľ Ž≥īŽāīŽäĒ Žį©Ž≤ēÍ≥ľ ŽŹôžĚľŪēėÍ≤Ć Ž≥īŽāīŽ©ī Žź©ŽčąŽč§.

žč†ŪėłŽäĒ ž†ĄžÜ° ž§ĎžĚľ ŽēĆ TWCR Ž†ąžßÄžä§ŪĄįžĚė TWINT ŽĻĄŪäłÍįÄ 0 žĚī ŽźėÍ≥†, ž†ĄžÜ°žĚī žôĄŽ£ĆŽźėŽ©ī 1 žĚī Žź©ŽčąŽč§. Í∑łŽěėžĄú žč†ŪėłŽ•ľ ž†ĄžÜ°Ūē† ŽēĆ ŽßąŽč§ TWINT ŽĻĄŪäłÍįÄ 1 žĚī ŽźėŽäĒ Í≤ÉžĚĄ ŪôēžĚłŪēīžēľ Ūē©ŽčąŽč§.

- S
 - TWCR Ž†ąžßÄžä§ŪĄįžĚė TWINT, TWSTA, TWEN ŽĻĄŪäłŽ•ľ 1 Ž°ú žĄ§ž†ēŪē©ŽčąŽč§.
- SLA + W
 - TWDR Ž†ąžßÄžä§ŪĄįžóź slavežĚė ž£ľžÜĆ 7 ŽĻĄŪäłžôÄ ,R/W 0(write) žĚĄ žĒĀŽčąŽč§. žėąŽ•ľ Žď§žĖī 1101001 žĚīŽĚľŽäĒ ž£ľžÜĆŽ•ľ ÍįĖŽäĒ slaveÍįÄ žěąŽč§Ž©ī TWDR Ž†ąžßÄžä§ŪĄįžóźŽäĒ 11010010žĚĄ žďįŽ©ī Žź©ŽčąŽč§.
 - TWCR Ž†ąžßÄžä§ŪĄįžóź TWINT, TWEN ŽĻĄŪäłŽ•ľ 1 Ž°ú žĄ§ž†ēŪē©ŽčąŽč§.
- Data(transmit)
 - TWDR Ž†ąžßÄžä§ŪĄįžóź 8bit ŽćįžĚīŪĄįŽ•ľ žĒĀŽčąŽč§.
 - TWCR Ž†ąžßÄžä§ŪĄįžóź TWINT, TWEN ŽĻĄŪäłŽ•ľ 1 Ž°ú žĄ§ž†ēŪē©ŽčąŽč§.
- P
 - TWCR Ž†ąžßÄžä§ŪĄįžóź TWINT, TWSTO, TWEN ŽĻĄŪäłŽ•ľ 1 Ž°ú žĄ§ž†ēŪē©ŽčąŽč§.
 - STOP žč†ŪėłŽäĒ TWINT ŽĻĄŪäłÍįÄ 1žĚłžßÄ ŪôēžĚłŪēėžßÄ žēäžäĶŽčąŽč§.

### slave -> master

ŪÜĶžč† žąúžĄúŽäĒ **S -> SLA + R -> Data -> ... -> P** žěÖŽčąŽč§.

žĄľžĄúŽ•ľ slaveŽ°ú žā¨žö©ŪēėŽäĒ Í≤Ĺžöį žĄľžĄúžóźžĄú ž∂úŽ†•Žź† žąė žěąŽäĒ žó¨Žü¨ÍįúžĚė Íįí ž§Ď žõźŪēėŽäĒ ÍįížĚĄ žĚĹžĖīžēľ ŪēėŽäĒ Í≤ĹžöįÍįÄ ŽßéžäĶŽčąŽč§. ŽĒįŽĚľžĄú žĄľžĄúŽßąŽč§ ŪÜĶžč† žąúžĄúÍįÄ Žč¨ŽĚľžßą žąė žěąžäĶŽčąŽč§.

slavežóźžĄú žĚĹÍ≥†žč∂žĚÄ ÍįížĚė Ž†ąžßÄžä§ŪĄį ž£ľžÜĆŽ•ľ SLRAŽĚľÍ≥† ŪēúŽč§Ž©ī ŽćįžĚīŪĄįŽ•ľ žĚĹÍłį ž†Ąžóź Ž®ľž†Ä žēĆŽ†§ž§ėžēľ Ūē©ŽčąŽč§.
ŽĒįŽĚľžĄú **S -> SLA + W -> SLRA -> Rs -> SLA + R -> Data -> ... -> P** žĚł ŪÜĶžč† žąúžĄúŽ•ľ ÍįĖÍ≤Ć Žź©ŽčąŽč§.

- SLA + R
 - TWDR Ž†ąžßÄžä§ŪĄįžóź slavežĚė ž£ľžÜĆ 7 ŽĻĄŪäłžôÄ ,R/W 1(read) žĚĄ žĒĀŽčąŽč§. žėąŽ•ľ Žď§žĖī 1101001 žĚīŽĚľŽäĒ ž£ľžÜĆŽ•ľ ÍįĖŽäĒ slaveÍįÄ žěąŽč§Ž©ī TWDR Ž†ąžßÄžä§ŪĄįžóźŽäĒ 11010011žĚĄ žďįŽ©ī Žź©ŽčąŽč§.
 - TWCR Ž†ąžßÄžä§ŪĄįžóź TWINT, TWEN ŽĻĄŪäłŽ•ľ 1 Ž°ú žĄ§ž†ēŪē©ŽčąŽč§.
- Data(recieve)
 - TWCR Ž†ąžßÄžä§ŪĄįžóź TWINT, TWEA, TWEN ŽĻĄŪäłŽ•ľ 1 Ž°ú žĄ§ž†ēŪē©ŽčąŽč§.
 - ŽßąžßÄŽßČ ŽćįžĚīŪĄįŽ•ľ žĚĹŽäĒ Í≤ĹžöįŽäĒ TWINT, TWEN ŽĻĄŪäłŽßĆ 1 Ž°ú žĄ§ž†ēŪē©ŽčąŽč§.
 - TWDR Ž†ąžßÄžä§ŪĄįžĚė ÍįížĚĄ žĚĹžäĶŽčąŽč§.

## ŪÜĶžč† žė§Ž•ė

ŪÜĶžč†žĚĄ Ūē† ŽēĆ, TWCR Ž†ąžßÄžä§ŪĄįžĚė TWINT ŽĻĄŪäłÍįÄ 1 žĚī ŽźėžßÄ žēäŽäĒ Í≤Ĺžöį ŪÜĶžč†žĚī žč§ŪĆ®ŪĖąŽč§ŽäĒ Í≤ÉžĚĄ žĚėŽĮłŪē©ŽčąŽč§.

žč§ŪĆ®žĚė žĚīžú†ŽäĒ TWSR Ž†ąžßÄžä§ŪĄįŽ•ľ žĚĹžúľŽ©ī žēĆ žąė žěąžäĶŽčąŽč§. (Íįížóź ŽĒįŽ•ł žč§ŪĆ® žā¨žú†ŽäĒ datasheetŽ•ľ žįłÍ≥†ŪēėŽ©ī Žź©ŽčąŽč§.) žč§ŪĆ®Ūēú Í≤Ĺžöį, žĚīŽ•ľ ž≤ėŽ¶¨ŪēėŽäĒ Ūē®žąėŽ•ľ ŽĒįŽ°ú ŽßĆŽď§Ž©ī Žź©ŽčąŽč§. Žč®žąúŪěą Ž¨īžčúŪēīŽŹĄ ŽźėŽäĒ Í≤Ĺžöį TWCRŽ†ąžßÄžä§ŪĄįžóź 0 žĚĄ žďįŽ©ī Žź©ŽčąŽč§.

title: AVR Lock and Fuse bits
text:
žĄ§ž†ēŽźėžĖī žěąŽäĒ ŽĻĄŪäłÍįÄ žĖīŽĖ§ žÉĀŪÉúžĚłžßÄ žēĆÍłį žúĄŪēīžĄú žēĄŽěėžôÄ ÍįôžĚī avrdude žĽ§Žß®ŽďúŽ•ľ žěÖŽ†•ŪēīžĄú ŪôēžĚłŪē† žąė žěąžäĶŽčąŽč§.

``shell
avrdude -p -c -U efuse:r:-:b -U hfuse:r:-:b -U lfuse:r:-:b -U lock:r:-:b
`

## Lock bits

Lock bitsŽäĒ ŪĒĄŽ°úÍ∑łŽěėŽ®łŽ•ľ ŪÜĶŪēī Ž©ĒŽ™®Ž¶¨žóź ž†ĎÍ∑ľŪēėŽäĒ Í≤ÉžĚĄ Ž≥īŪėłŪēėŽäĒ žĄ§ž†ēžóź ŽĆÄŪēú ŽĻĄŪäłžěÖŽčąŽč§.

Lock bitsžóź 0 žďįŽäĒ Í≤ÉžĚÄ žěźžú†Ž°≠žßÄŽßĆ 1 žĚĄ žďįÍłį žúĄŪēīžĄúŽäĒ žĻ©žĚĄ žßÄžõĆžēľ Ūē©ŽčąŽč§.

-e žėĶžÖėžĚĄ žā¨žö©ŪēėŽ©ī flash ROM, EEPROM, Lock bitsŽ•ľ Ž™®ŽĎź **0xFF**Ž°ú žīąÍłįŪôĒ žčúŪāĶŽčąŽč§. flashžóź ŪĒĄŽ°úÍ∑łŽě®žĚĄ žóÖŽ°úŽďúŪēėŽ©ī žěźŽŹôžúľŽ°ú -e žėĶžÖėžĚī ž†Āžö©ŽźėÍłį ŽēĆŽ¨łžóź Lock bitsŽäĒ žóÖŽ°úŽďú ŪõĄžóź Ūē≠žÉĀ **0xFF**Ž°ú žīąÍłįŪôĒ ŽźėžĖī žěąžäĶŽčąŽč§.

Í∑łŽü¨ŽĮÄŽ°ú ŪĒĄŽ°úÍ∑łŽě®žĚĄ žóÖŽ°úŽďú ŪēėÍłį ž†Ąžóź -e žėĶžÖėžĚĄ žā¨žö©Ūēėžó¨ Íįēž†úž†ĀžúľŽ°ú Lock bitsŽ•ľ žĄ§ž†ēŪēėŽäĒ Í≤ÉžĚÄ Ž¨īžĚėŽĮł Ūē©ŽčąŽč§.

`shell
avrdude -p -c -U efuse:w:[0bxxxxxxxx]:m
`

## Fuse bits

Fuse bitsŽäĒ Extended, High, Low žĄł žĘÖŽ•ėŽ°ú ŪĒĄŽ°úÍ∑łŽěėŽ®ł, Ž∂ÄŪäł žā¨žĚīž¶ą, ŪĀīŽü≠ žÜĆžä§ ŽďĪžĚė žĄ§ž†ēžóź ŽĆÄŪēú ŽĻĄŪäłžěÖŽčąŽč§.

ÍłįŽä•žóź ŪēīŽčĻŪēėŽäĒ ŽĻĄŪäłŽ•ľ 0 žúľŽ°ú žĄ§ž†ēŪēėŽ©ī ŪôúžĄĪŪôĒŽźėÍ≥† 1 Ž°ú žĄ§ž†ēŪēėŽ©ī ŽĻĄŪôúžĄĪŪôĒ Žź©ŽčąŽč§.

### Extended Fuse bits

`shell
avrdude -p -c -U efuse:w:[0bxxxxxxxx]:m
`

### Fuse High bits

`shell
avrdude -p -c -U hfuse:w:[0bxxxxxxxx]:m
`

### Fuse Low bits

`shell
avrdude -p -c -U lfuse:w:[0bxxxxxxxx]:m
``

`

## žąėŽŹô žóÖŽ°úŽďú

## F_CPU

SAM 32bitžóźžĄúŽäĒ Ž™áÍįÄžßÄ Žč®Í≥ĄŽ•ľ ÍĪįž≥ź žĶúžĘÖ ŪĀīŽü≠žĚī ž†ēŪēīžßÄÍłį ŽēĆŽ¨łžóź **F_CPU**ŽäĒ ŪĀīŽü≠ ÍīÄŽ†® Ūē®žąė Žß§ŪĀ¨Ž°úŽ°ú ž†ēžĚėŽźėžĖī žěąžäĶŽčąŽč§.

## Examples

120MHz system clockžĚĄ žĖĽÍłį žúĄŪēī žēĄŽěėžôÄ ÍįôžĚī ÍįížĚĄ Í≤įž†ēŪē©ŽčąŽč§.

- Internal 12MHz RC oscillator
- System clock source: PLLA
- System clock prescaler: 2 (divided by 2)
- PLLA source: Internal 12MHz RC oscillator
- PLLA output: Internal 12MHz RC oscillator \* 20 / 1
- System clock: 12 \* 20 / 1 / 2 = 120MHz

žúĄžóźžĄú Í≤įž†ēŽźú ÍįížĚĄ ŽįĒŪÉēžúľŽ°ú src\config\conf_clock.hŽ•ľ žĄ§ž†ēŪēėŽ©ī žēĄŽěėžôÄ ÍįôžäĶŽčąŽč§.

#define CONFIG_SYSCLK_PRES SYSCLK_PRES_2
#define CONFIG_PLL0_SOURCE PLL_SRC_MAINCK_12M_RC
#define CONFIG_PLL0_MUL 20
#define CONFIG_PLL0_DIV 1
``

title: STM32 SPI
text:
## Pinout & Configuration

## Function

``c
/**
 * @brief Transmit an amount of data in blocking mode.
 * @param hspi pointer to a SPI_HandleTypeDef structure that contains
 * the configuration information for SPI module.
 * @param pData pointer to data buffer
 * @param Size amount of data to be sent
 * @param Timeout Timeout duration
 * @retval HAL status
 */
HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_SPI_Transmit(SPI_HandleTypeDef *hspi,
 uint8_t * pData,
 uint16_t Size,
 uint32_t Timeout);
`

`c
/**
 * @brief Receive an amount of data in blocking mode.
 * @param hspi pointer to a SPI_HandleTypeDef structure that contains
 * the configuration information for SPI module.
 * @param pData pointer to data buffer
 * @param Size amount of data to be received
 * @param Timeout Timeout duration
 * @retval HAL status
 */
HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_SPI_Receive(SPI_HandleTypeDef *hspi,
 uint8_t * pData,
 uint16_t Size,
 uint32_t Timeout);
`

`c
/**
 * @brief Transmit and Receive an amount of data in blocking mode.
 * @param hspi pointer to a SPI_HandleTypeDef structure that contains
 * the configuration information for SPI module.
 * @param pTxData pointer to transmission data buffer
 * @param pRxData pointer to reception data buffer
 * @param Size amount of data to be sent and received
 * @param Timeout Timeout duration
 * @retval HAL status
 */
HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_SPI_TransmitReceive(SPI_HandleTypeDef *hspi,
 uint8_t * pTxData,
 uint8_t * pRxData,
 uint16_t Size,
 uint32_t Timeout);
``

## Ž∂ÄŪäł Ž™®Žďú

| BOOT1 | BOOT0 | Boot mode | Aliasing |
| :---: | :---: | :---------------- | :---------------------------------------------- |
| X | 0 | User Flash memory | User Flash memory is selected as the boot space |
| 0 | 1 | System memory | System memory is selected as the boot space |
| 1 | 1 | Embedded SRAM | Embedded SRAM is selected as the boot space |

- **User Flash memory**: (0x08000000)žóźžĄú žčúžěĎŪēėŽäĒ žĚľŽįėž†ĀžĚł Ž∂ÄŪĆÖžěÖŽčąŽč§. ST-LINKŽ•ľ žā¨žö©ŪēėŽ©ī žā¨žö©žěźÍįÄ žč§ŪĖČ ŪĆĆžĚľžĚĄ žóÖŽ°úŽďú Ūē† ŽēĆ, ŪĒĆŽěėžčú Ž©ĒŽ™®Ž¶¨žóź žč§ŪĖČ ŪĆĆžĚľžĚī Žč§žöīŽ°úŽďú Žź©ŽčąŽč§.
